name: Ranni the Witch
changes: Found one essential missing step and corrected it. (1) MISSING STEP ADDED: After crossing Nokstella and before the Lake of Rot, the player must defeat the Baleful Shadow (a Blaidd-imitating assassin near the Nokstella Waterfall Basin); killing it prompts Miniature Ranni to grant the Discarded Palace Key, which is REQUIRED to open the Dark Moon Ring chest in Raya Lucaria. Without this step the questline cannot be completed, so it was inserted with anchor NPC "Baleful Shadow" between the Nokstella and Lake of Rot steps. (2) Final step reworded so the Dark Moon Ring is correctly tied to the Discarded Palace Key obtained from the Baleful Shadow, fixing the prior dangling reference. (3) Verified all other steps, rewards, and anchors against Fextralife/GamesRadar/GameRant: first step's Spirit Calling Bell + Lone Wolf Ashes from Renna at Church of Elleh confirmed; Radahn opening Nokron, Fingerslayer Blade return, Renna's Rise waygate to Ainsel River Main, Lake of Rot crossing to Grand Cloister, Astel, and Cathedral of Manus Celes all confirmed correct and in order. No other changes.

steps.title: Meet Renna
steps.desc: Speak with Renna atop the Church of Elleh to receive the Spirit Calling Bell and the Lone Wolf Ashes.

steps.title: Summon Blaidd
steps.desc: Answer Blaidd's howl by climbing to the ruins ledge in eastern Mistwood to begin his and Ranni's quests.

steps.title: Pledge to Ranni
steps.desc: Enter Ranni's service at Ranni's Rise in the Three Sisters, meeting Iji and Seluvis.

steps.title: Defeat Starscourge Radahn
steps.desc: Slay Radahn in Caelid so the falling star tears open the path down to Nokron.
steps.warn: Pledge to Ranni and answer Blaidd's howl BEFORE triggering the Radahn Festival (any Altus grace or Grand Lift of Dectus); else Blaidd vanishes and Ranni won't reappear at her Rise.

steps.title: Enter Nokron
steps.desc: Drop into the new crater near Mistwood to descend into Nokron, Eternal City.

steps.title: Claim the Fingerslayer Blade
steps.desc: Take the Fingerslayer Blade from its chest in Nokron, then return it to Ranni for the Carian Inverted Statue.
steps.warn: Get the Magic Scorpion Charm from Seluvis (give him Amber Starlight) BEFORE returning the Fingerslayer Blade to Ranni; doing so kills Seluvis and locks the charm forever.

steps.title: Descend to Ainsel River
steps.desc: Use the waygate atop the now-open Renna's Rise to reach Ainsel River Main and loot the Miniature Ranni doll.

steps.title: Cross Nokstella
steps.desc: Travel through Nokstella, Eternal City to reach the Ainsel River's far depths.

steps.title: Defeat the Baleful Shadow
steps.desc: Slay the Blaidd-like Baleful Shadow near the Nokstella waterfall so Miniature Ranni grants the Discarded Palace Key.

steps.title: Brave the Lake of Rot
steps.desc: Cross the toxic Lake of Rot via the stepping stones to reach the Grand Cloister and Astel's coffin.

steps.title: Defeat Astel
steps.desc: Use the coffin in the Grand Cloister to confront and defeat Astel, Naturalborn of the Void.

steps.title: Dark Moon Ring
steps.desc: Open the Grand Library chest at Raya Lucaria with the Discarded Palace Key to claim the Dark Moon Ring.

steps.title: Age of the Stars
steps.desc: Place the Dark Moon Ring on Ranni at the Cathedral of Manus Celes to receive the Dark Moon Greatsword and choose the Age of the Stars ending.

name: Millicent
changes: Verified against Fextralife and corroborating guides. Fixed remaining errors: (1) The 'Revive Millicent' step was factually wrong â€” Millicent administers the mended needle to HERSELF ('avert your eyes for a moment') and awakens on reload; the player does NOT heal/revive her. Rewrote it as delivering the needle, and added the reward she grants there: the Prosthesis-Wearer Heirloom talisman. (2) Reordered to the canonical chronology: needle delivery at Church of the Plague (where she wakes and gives the Heirloom) comes BEFORE retrieving the Valkyrie's Prosthesis from the Shaded Castle and handing it over at Erdtree-Gazing Hill. (3) Replaced the vague 'Follow Her to the Haligtree' beat with the concrete missing step: summon her via the golden sign to fight the Godskin Apostle at Dominula, Windmill Village, after which she progresses through the Mountaintops toward the Haligtree. Confirmed and kept correct: Gowry's Shack east of Aeonia Swamp; Unalloyed Gold Needle from Commander O'Neil; prosthesis hand-off at Erdtree-Gazing Hill; mutually exclusive Elphael rewards (aid = Rotten Winged Sword Insignia plus Unalloyed Gold Needle from her body; oppose = Millicent's Prosthesis); Miquella's Needle correctly excluded.

steps.title: Sage Gowry
steps.desc: Begin the quest at Gowry's Shack east of Aeonia Swamp in Caelid; he tasks you with recovering the Unalloyed Gold Needle.
steps.warn: Don't aggro the Giant Dog before the shack - it can follow you in and kill Gowry, permanently breaking the quest.

steps.title: Defeat Commander O'Neil
steps.desc: Slay him in the tree-ringed portion of the Aeonia Swamp to obtain the Unalloyed Gold Needle.

steps.title: Return the Needle to Gowry
steps.desc: Give the needle to Gowry to mend, then reload and collect the repaired Unalloyed Gold Needle from him.
steps.warn: Give the needle to Gowry BEFORE talking to Millicent at the Church of the Plague, or Gowry can vanish and never repair it.

steps.title: Deliver the Needle to Millicent
steps.desc: Hand the mended needle to the ailing Millicent at the Church of the Plague; she uses it herself, then awakens and grants the Prosthesis-Wearer Heirloom.

steps.title: Valkyrie's Prosthesis
steps.desc: Recover it from a chest guarded by a Cleanrot Knight inside the Shaded Castle in the northern Altus Plateau.

steps.title: Restore Millicent
steps.desc: Give her the prosthesis where she stands north of Erdtree-Gazing Hill on the Altus Plateau.

steps.title: Aid Her at Windmill Village
steps.desc: Answer her golden summon sign to help defeat the Godskin Apostle at Dominula, Windmill Village, after which she journeys on through the Mountaintops toward the Haligtree.
steps.warn: After the Godskin Apostle, rest at the grace and exhaust Millicent's dialogue there before advancing, or progression can stall.

steps.title: Aid or Oppose
steps.desc: At Elphael, defeat the nearby Putrid Tree Spirit, then choose her golden summon to fight her sisters alongside her or the red sign to challenge her alone.
steps.warn: One-time, irreversible choice: aiding gives Rotten Winged Sword Insignia; opposing gives only Millicent's Prosthesis. You can't get both.

steps.title: Millicent's End
steps.desc: Aiding her yields the Rotten Winged Sword Insignia (with the Unalloyed Gold Needle appearing on her body afterward); opposing her yields Millicent's Prosthesis.

name: Volcano Manor (Tanith)
changes: Verified order and targets against canonical wiki: Old Knight Istvan (Stormhill) -> Rileigh the Idle (Altus Plateau ravine to Shaded Castle, near the Bridge of Iniquity) -> Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood (Mountaintops of the Giants) is correct. Fixed one remaining error: the Serpent-Hunter is not on a "table in the Temple of Eiglay" â€” it is grabbed from a corpse to the left immediately upon entering Rykard's boss arena (accessed via the Temple of Eiglay), so the description was corrected. All other steps, rewards, and anchors verified accurate.

steps.title: Recusant Invitation
steps.desc: Join Volcano Manor through Tanith and read the first Letter from Volcano Manor.

steps.title: Hunt: Old Knight Istvan
steps.desc: Use the red summon sign to invade and defeat Old Knight Istvan at the bridge near Warmaster's Shack, then report back to Tanith.
steps.warn: Finish all three hunts (Istvan, Rileigh, Juno) BEFORE killing Rykard - his death cancels any unfinished contracts.

steps.title: Hunt: Rileigh the Idle
steps.desc: Read the second letter and invade Rileigh the Idle in the ravine to the Shaded Castle on the Altus Plateau, near the Bridge of Iniquity.

steps.title: Hunt: Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood
steps.desc: Read the red letter and invade Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood in the Mountaintops of the Giants.
steps.warn: Juno's invasion sign is in the Mountaintops of the Giants - you must progress past Leyndell to reach it, and do it before defeating Rykard.

steps.title: Obtain the Serpent-Hunter
steps.desc: Grab the Serpent-Hunter great spear from the corpse on the left as you enter Rykard's arena via the Temple of Eiglay.
steps.warn: Grab the Serpent-Hunter spear from the corpse as you enter the arena - it is the intended way to kill Rykard and makes the fight far easier.

steps.title: Defeat Rykard
steps.desc: Wield the Serpent-Hunter to slay Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy.
steps.warn: Defeating Rykard ends Volcano Manor progression: unfinished hunts are locked out and manor NPC quests (Rya, Bernahl, Patches) may vanish.

steps.title: Tanith's Farewell
steps.desc: Return to Tanith, who consumes Rykard's remains and concludes the Volcano Manor questline.

name: Fia, Deathbed Companion
changes: Verified against canonical wiki order; the prior corrections all hold. Confirmed the Weathered Dagger goes to D, Hunter of the Dead (the living brother at Roundtable Hold) and that no Twinned Armor reward belongs to this step. Confirmed the Cursemark of Death is obtained at the Divine Tower of Liurnia via Ranni's Carian Inverted Statue flipping the Carian Study Hall (requires Ranni's quest progress). Confirmed chronological order: give Cursemark to Fia at Deeproot Depths to receive Radiant Baldachin's Blessing, then reload and inspect the sleeping Fia to enter the Deathbed Dream, defeat Lichdragon Fortissax, and loot the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince from her body. Clarified the Deeproot step reward (Radiant Baldachin's Blessing) and noted the reload requirement so the sleeping-Fia interaction is reachable.

steps.title: Fia's Embrace
steps.desc: Accept her hold at the Roundtable Hold to receive Baldachin's Blessing, which boosts poise but lowers max HP.
steps.warn: Start Fia's quest BEFORE defeating Maliketh the Black-Blade. After that she's gone and the whole questline (and Duskborn ending) is locked out.

steps.title: Weathered Dagger
steps.desc: Receive the Weathered Dagger from Fia and deliver it to D at the Roundtable Hold to advance the quest.
steps.warn: Burning the Erdtree sends Fia to Deeproot Depths early, skipping the Roundtable Hold steps (Weathered Dagger to D, Knifeprint/Rogier). Do these first.

steps.title: Cursemark of Death
steps.desc: Obtain the Cursemark of Death atop the Divine Tower of Liurnia, reached by inverting the Carian Study Hall with Ranni's Carian Inverted Statue.
steps.warn: Needs Ranni's Carian Inverted Statue - advance Ranni's quest to delivering the Fingerslayer Blade (post-Nokron) before you can invert the Study Hall.

steps.title: Deeproot Depths
steps.desc: Reach Deeproot Depths via Nokron's coffin route and give Fia the Cursemark of Death to receive the Radiant Baldachin's Blessing.

steps.title: Defeat Lichdragon Fortissax
steps.desc: Reload the area, then inspect the sleeping Fia to enter her Deathbed Dream and slay Lichdragon Fortissax.
steps.warn: Don't give D's brother the Twinned Armor (found before the Valiant Gargoyles) - it makes him kill Fia. The ending still works, but Fia dies.

steps.title: Mending Rune of the Death-Prince
steps.desc: Loot the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince from Fia after the battle to unlock the Age of the Duskborn ending.

name: Dung Eater
changes: Verified against Fextralife and walkthroughs; the corrected questline was largely accurate. Order confirmed: meet at Roundtable Hold (after reaching Leyndell), show a Seedbed Curse for the Sewer-Gaol Key, free his bound body in the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds, survive his invasion at Leyndell's outer moat (only triggers if you freed him), then deliver five Seedbed Curses to his body for the Mending Rune of the Fell Curse and the dropped Omen set. Tightened step 3 to make explicit that you FREE his body (the trigger for the later invasion). Kept the grace anchor as Subterranean Inquisition Chamber, the closest valid grace in the Shunning-Grounds (the literal nearest grace, Underground Roadside, is not in the valid list). All rewards and the outer-moat invasion location confirmed correct.

steps.title: A Seething Plea
steps.desc: Meet the Dung Eater in the locked room beside the Twin Maiden Husks at Roundtable Hold, which opens after you reach the Altus Plateau.
steps.warn: The locked room beside the Twin Maiden Husks only opens once you have reached the Altus Plateau.

steps.title: Show a Seedbed Curse
steps.desc: Approach him while holding any Seedbed Curse so he hands over the Sewer-Gaol Key and asks you to find his real body.

steps.title: Free His Bound Body
steps.desc: Use the Sewer-Gaol Key to unlock and free his imprisoned body deep in the Subterranean Shunning-Grounds beneath Leyndell.
steps.warn: Do NOT attack/kill his bound body in the cell before freeing it - killing it here softlocks the quest (no invasion, no completion).

steps.title: Defeat His Invasion
steps.desc: Having freed him, return later to Leyndell's outer moat where he invades you; defeat him to claim the Sword of Milos.
steps.warn: Finish Blackguard Big Boggart's quest and grab his Seedbed Curse BEFORE this moat invasion, or his curse is lost forever.

steps.title: Deliver Five Seedbed Curses
steps.desc: Bring five Seedbed Curses to his bound body back in the sewer cell to complete his quest.
steps.warn: Collect the Leyndell Seedbed Curses BEFORE defeating Maliketh - burning the Erdtree turns Leyndell to Ash and locks them out, risking quest completion.

steps.title: Mending Rune of the Fell Curse
steps.desc: Receive the Mending Rune of the Fell Curse, after which reloading the area leaves the Omen armor set in his cell.
steps.anchor: Mending Rune of the Fell Curse

name: Nepheli Loux
changes: Corrected the Village of the Albinaurics step: the Stormhawk King ashes are NOT obtained there. At the Village you only reunite with Nepheli after she leaves the Roundtable. The ashes are acquired at the Chapel of Anticipation and then GIVEN to her back at the Roundtable Hold (the previous step both mislocated the item and reversed the transfer direction). Split this into a reunion step and a give-ashes step, and inserted the essential Kenneth Haight prerequisite (his questline must be completed and he must name Nepheli ruler) plus the Morgott defeat that triggers her move to the throne room. Kept the corrected Arsenal Charm (Roundtable) and Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone (throne) rewards.

steps.title: Stormveil Castle
steps.desc: Find Nepheli over a slain knight near the Liftside Chamber and exhaust her dialogue so she can be summoned against Godrick.
steps.warn: Exhaust her dialogue here BEFORE killing Godrick, or you can't summon her for the fight and the quest won't advance.

steps.title: Defeat Godrick the Grafted
steps.desc: Summon Nepheli's golden sign before the fog and defeat Godrick to advance her quest.

steps.title: Roundtable Hold
steps.desc: Speak with Nepheli and Gideon at the Hold, receiving the Arsenal Charm talisman from her.
steps.warn: Do NOT give Nepheli Seluvis's potion - it puppets her and permanently locks out the rest of her quest.

steps.title: Village of the Albinaurics
steps.desc: After she leaves the Hold, reunite with Nepheli beneath the bridge leading into the Village of the Albinaurics and exhaust her dialogue.
steps.warn: Talk to her under the bridge BEFORE killing the Omenkiller across the bridge above her, or you may miss this step.

steps.title: Obtain the Stormhawk King
steps.desc: Retrieve the Stormhawk King spirit ashes from the Chapel of Anticipation (reached via the Four Belfries portal).
steps.warn: Needs an Imbued Sword Key to open the Four Belfries 'Precipice of Anticipation' portal; beat the Grafted Scion to reach the ashes.

steps.title: Return to the Roundtable Hold
steps.desc: Give the Stormhawk King ashes to Nepheli, now back in the room outside the library, and exhaust her dialogue.
steps.warn: Give her the Stormhawk King BEFORE defeating Maliketh/burning the Erdtree - reaching Ashen Capital removes her and locks the quest.

steps.title: Complete Kenneth Haight's quest
steps.desc: Finish Kenneth Haight's questline so he names Nepheli the rightful ruler of Limgrave, a prerequisite for her throne-room appearance.

steps.title: Defeat Morgott, the Omen King
steps.desc: Defeat Morgott in Leyndell to trigger Nepheli's relocation to Godrick's throne room (Maliketh must still be alive).
steps.warn: Morgott must be dead but Maliketh alive for the throne-room scene; don't kill Maliketh until the quest is finished.

steps.title: Stormveil Throne Room
steps.desc: Return to Godrick's throne room and meet Nepheli (with Kenneth and Gostoc) to receive the Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.

name: Alexander, Iron Fist
changes: Kept the corrected early order (Saintsbridge, then Gael Tunnel before the Radahn Festival, then Redmane Castle), which matches canonical wiki order. Fixed two remaining errors: (1) Restored the MISSING Liurnia step â€” after the festival Alexander is stuck in a hole south of Carian Study Hall, where you make him slippery with an Oil Pot and strike him free, earning Exalted Flesh; this is where he says he will head to the fiery mount in the north. (2) Corrected the Mt. Gelmir step: he is NOT stuck in a hole there and you do not pull him out â€” he stands proudly in the lava pool near Seethewater Terminus (behind a Magma Wyrm), where you simply exhaust his dialogue. Moved the volcano/oil-pot "harden himself" detail to its correct Liurnia origin. Final Crumbling Farum Azula duel reward (Shard of Alexander, anchored on the item) confirmed accurate.

steps.title: Stuck in a Hole
steps.desc: Free Alexander by striking him loose from a hole in Stormhill, north of Saintsbridge; he rewards Exalted Flesh and the Triumphant Delight gesture.

steps.title: Gael Tunnel
steps.desc: Find him stuck again at Gael Tunnel on the Limgrave-Caelid border, where he speaks of the Caelid festival.

steps.title: Radahn Festival
steps.desc: Summon him as a cooperator to fight alongside you against Radahn at Redmane Castle.
steps.warn: After defeating Radahn, return and exhaust his dialogue at the arena. Skipping this can leave him stuck at Redmane forever.

steps.title: Exalted Flesh
steps.desc: Find him lodged in a hole south of Carian Study Hall in Liurnia, free him with an Oil Pot, and receive Exalted Flesh as he vows to harden himself at the fiery mount.

steps.title: Mt. Gelmir
steps.desc: Speak with him as he stands proudly in the lava pool near Seethewater Terminus, where he has come to temper his clay in the volcano's heat.

steps.title: Shard of Alexander
steps.desc: Win his final duel at Crumbling Farum Azula to claim the Shard of Alexander talisman.
steps.warn: Only the Farum Azula duel drops the Shard of Alexander. Killing him at any earlier location gives just the Warrior Jar Shard.  Â·  He only appears at Farum Azula after you defeat the Fire Giant and complete his earlier steps in order.

name: Goldmask & Corhyn
changes: Verified the corrected questline against canonical wiki order (gamepressure, GamesRadar, Fextralife, Fandom) â€” order, steps, rewards, and anchors are all accurate. Confirmed: Goldmask is found first on the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge before reporting to Corhyn; the Golden Order Principia drops after defeating Godfrey in Erdtree Sanctuary and Law of Regression is then bought from Corhyn/Miriel; the Radagon statue (revealing Marika/Radagon are one) is in Leyndell and yields the Golden Order Totality gesture; the Mountaintops bridge meeting follows the revelation; the Mending Rune of Perfect Order is looted from Goldmask's corpse in Leyndell, Capital of Ash. Only edit: tightened step 6 wording (the statue is in Leyndell, reached via the staircase toward the Erdtree, not "lower Leyndell") and noted the Golden Order Totality gesture reward.

steps.title: Brother Corhyn
steps.desc: Meet Corhyn studying incantations at the Roundtable Hold.

steps.title: Find Goldmask
steps.desc: Locate the silent Goldmask on the Forest-Spanning Greatbridge in northern Altus Plateau.

steps.title: Reunite the Pair
steps.desc: Tell Corhyn (north of Altus Highway Junction) of Goldmask's whereabouts so he joins him.

steps.title: Toward the Capital
steps.desc: Both relocate to Leyndell, where Goldmask ponders Radagon's true identity.

steps.title: Law of Regression
steps.desc: Retrieve the Golden Order Principia from a corpse on a hanging chair above the Erdtree Sanctuary Site of Grace in Leyndell (climb the roots and enter through the rooftop window), then learn Law of Regression from Corhyn or Miriel.
steps.warn: Get the Principia and learn Law of Regression BEFORE burning the Erdtree (Forge of the Giants, after Fire Giant), or Corhyn vanishes and the quest is lost.

steps.title: Reveal the Truth
steps.desc: Cast Law of Regression on Radagon's statue in Leyndell to expose Marika and Radagon as one, then report the truth to Goldmask, who awards the Golden Order Totality gesture.
steps.warn: Cast Law of Regression on Radagon's statue BEFORE burning the Erdtree. Burning it first makes Corhyn leave only his Bell Bearing - quest cannot be finished.

steps.title: Mountaintops Meeting
steps.desc: Find the pair on a great bridge in the Mountaintops of the Giants as Goldmask weighs the Order's flaws.

steps.title: Mending Rune of Perfect Order
steps.desc: In Leyndell, Capital of Ash, loot the Mending Rune from Goldmask's body for the Age of Order ending.
steps.warn: Goldmask's corpse only appears in Leyndell, Capital of Ash after you complete Crumbling Farum Azula (defeat Maliketh). Loot the rune then.

name: Yura, Hunter of Bloody Fingers

steps.title: Meet Yura at Agheel Lake
steps.desc: Travel northeast from the Seaside Ruins grace toward Agheel Lake to find Yura resting beneath a tunnel-like overpass and speak with him.
steps.warn: You must speak to Yura here at least once, or he won't relocate to Raya Lucaria and the quest can't advance.

steps.title: Survive the Nerijus invasion
steps.desc: Approach Murkwater Cave where Bloody Finger Nerijus invades, and summon Yura's white sign to help you defeat him.

steps.title: Obtain Reduvia
steps.desc: Defeat Bloody Finger Nerijus during the invasion to receive the Reduvia bleed dagger as a drop.

steps.title: Speak with Yura after the invasion
steps.desc: Find Yura under a tunnel-like ruin directly north of Murkwater Cave, where he explains his mission to hunt Bloody Fingers.

steps.title: Answer Yura's summon at Raya Lucaria
steps.desc: Cross into Liurnia and use Yura's red summon sign at the Main Academy Gate to enter his world against the Bloody Finger Ravenmount Assassin.

steps.title: Talk to Yura after the cooperation
steps.desc: After defeating the Ravenmount Assassin, speak with Yura near the Main Academy Gate to receive Ash of War: Raptor of the Mists and a Smithing Stone [5].

steps.title: Find the dying Yura at the Second Church of Marika
steps.desc: Travel to the Second Church of Marika in the Altus Plateau and speak to the mortally wounded Yura, who was bested by Eleonora.
steps.warn: Do before taking the Grand Lift of Rold. Yura vanishes (possessed by Shabriri) once you enter the Rold Lift hall.

steps.title: Obtain the Nagakiba
steps.desc: Receive the Nagakiba katana dropped by the dying Yura at the Second Church of Marika.
steps.warn: If Yura is possessed before you reach him here, loot the Nagakiba from his initial Agheel Lake spot, the pass below Murkwater Coast, or the bridge near Main Academy Gate.

steps.title: Trigger Eleonora's invasion
steps.desc: Speaking to the dying Yura activates the invasion of Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger, at the Second Church of Marika.

steps.title: Defeat Eleonora and claim the reward
steps.desc: Defeat Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger to obtain Eleonora's Poleblade and the Purifying Crystal Tear, completing Yura's quest.
steps.warn: Reach the dying Yura before the Grand Lift of Rold; if he's possessed first, this Eleonora invasion (Poleblade + Purifying Crystal Tear) is lost.

notes: Verified against Fextralife and cross-checked via web search. All locations, chronological order, anchors, and rewards in the draft were accurate; only minor corrections made. Sequence: Yura first appears under an overpass directly northeast of Seaside Ruins near Agheel Lake; he can be summoned as a white sign during the Bloody Finger Nerijus invasion at Murkwater Cave (Nerijus drops Reduvia), after which he relocates directly north of Murkwater Cave under a tunnel-like ruin. He then offers a red co-op summon sign at the Main Academy Gate grace in Liurnia to fight the Bloody Finger Ravenmount Assassin (full reward: Ash of War: Raptor of the Mists, Smithing Stone [5], plus a Rune Arc and Furlcalling Finger Remedy). His quest ends at the Second Church of Marika on the Altus Plateau, where the dying Yura drops the Nagakiba; speaking to him triggers Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger, whose defeat yields Eleonora's Poleblade, the Purifying Crystal Tear, and a Furlcalling Finger Remedy. Note: the Liurnia step is at Raya Lucaria Academy's Main Academy Gate (not a separate bridge grace); the draft's wording was tightened to reflect the summon sign appears at that grace. Post-quest, Yura's body is possessed by Shabriri ("Imposter Yura") at the Zamor Ruins in the Mountaintops of the Giants, dropping the Ronin set and Iron Kasa if killed, but that is an epilogue beyond the core questline. Sources: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Bloody+Finger+Hunter+Yura and https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Eleonora,+Violet+Bloody+Finger

name: Patches

steps.title: Enter Murkwater Cave
steps.desc: Follow the river running north from Agheel Lake in Limgrave into Murkwater Cave, then open the chest at the rear of the cave to trigger the Patches boss fight.

steps.title: Spare Patches when he surrenders
steps.desc: Fight Patches until he begs for mercy at roughly half health, then stop attacking to accept his surrender, which teaches the Grovel for Mercy gesture and opens his shop instead of killing him.
steps.warn: Stop attacking when he begs. Killing Patches here permanently ends his quest and removes him as a merchant for the whole playthrough.

steps.title: Open the trapped chest to Mistwood
steps.desc: Return to Patches' shop and ask about the new chest he offers, which springs a trap and teleports you near the Mistwood Ruins in eastern Limgrave.

steps.title: Return and earn the Calm Down gesture
steps.desc: Travel back to Murkwater Cave and speak with Patches again after the chest trap to receive the Calm Down gesture and continue the questline.

steps.title: Find Patches at Scenic Isle
steps.desc: Enter Liurnia of the Lakes, where Patches has relocated to set up shop beside the Scenic Isle Site of Grace in the southern swamp.

steps.title: Hear Patches' Abductor Virgin tip
steps.desc: Speak with Patches at Scenic Isle so he tells you about the Abductor Virgin at the Academy of Raya Lucaria that he claims will transport you to the foot of the Erdtree.

steps.title: Get abducted toward Volcano Manor
steps.desc: Let the Abductor Virgin at the Academy of Raya Lucaria capture and kill you, which actually delivers you to the prison cells beneath Volcano Manor on Mt. Gelmir.

steps.title: Reach Patches' Mt. Gelmir cliff
steps.desc: On Mt. Gelmir, follow the trail of rainbow stones near the First Mt. Gelmir Campsite to the cliff edge, where Patches appears and kicks you off while warning you away from Volcano Manor.

steps.title: Join Volcano Manor under Tanith
steps.desc: Enter Volcano Manor and accept Lady Tanith's invitation to join the Recusants, after which Patches sets up shop in the entrance hallway before the Volcano Manor grace.

steps.title: Receive the Letter to Patches
steps.desc: After completing Tanith's first assassination request against Old Knight Istvan, speak to Patches in the Volcano Manor hallway to receive the Letter to Patches naming Great-Horned Tragoth as the target.

steps.title: Invade and kill Great-Horned Tragoth
steps.desc: Rest at the Magma Wyrm Makar grace in the Ruin-Strewn Precipice and use the red summon sign in that boss room to invade and defeat Great-Horned Tragoth, who drops the Bull-Goat armor set.

steps.title: Claim the Magma Whip Candlestick
steps.desc: Return to Patches at Volcano Manor and reload the area, then speak to him to receive the Magma Whip Candlestick before he leaves once Rykard is slain.
steps.warn: Get the Magma Whip Candlestick BEFORE defeating Rykard (step 13). Patches leaves the manor once Rykard dies and it is lost otherwise.

steps.title: Defeat Rykard to empty the manor
steps.desc: Defeat Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy at Volcano Manor, after which Patches and the other residents abandon the manor.

steps.title: Find injured Patches at Shaded Castle
steps.desc: Travel to the Shaded Castle in northern Altus Plateau and find Patches lying injured on the walkway before the Elemer of the Briar boss room, where he entrusts you with the Dancer's Castanets.

steps.title: Deliver the Dancer's Castanets to Tanith
steps.desc: Bring the Dancer's Castanets that Patches entrusted to you back to Tanith at Volcano Manor to fulfill his request on his behalf.
steps.warn: Tanith must still be present to receive the Castanets. If she is killed/gone, this delivery can no longer be completed.

steps.title: Confront Patches one last time at Murkwater Cave
steps.desc: Return to Murkwater Cave, where Patches reappears as a boss but stops fighting once he recognizes you, teaching the Patches' Crouch gesture.

steps.title: Reload to reopen Patches' shop
steps.desc: Reload the Murkwater Cave area after the final encounter so Patches sits back down and permanently reopens his shop.

notes: Corrections from the draft: (1) The gesture sequence was fixed. Sparing/accepting his surrender in the Murkwater boss fight teaches GROVEL FOR MERCY (the draft wrongly attributed this to a separate 'forgive' step). CALM DOWN is taught when you return to him after the Mistwood chest trap. The draft's two separate 'spare' then 'forgive' steps were merged to match the actual flow. (2) Optional EXTREME REPENTANCE comes from aggroing/attacking Patches and letting him drop you to ~1/4 HP (most easily at the final Murkwater encounter); PATCHES' CROUCH is the final-fight reward. (3) Tragoth's invasion red sign is in the Ruin-Strewn Precipice inside Magma Wyrm Makar's boss room (rest at that grace first) â€” step 11 was re-anchored to the Ruin-Strewn Precipice grace since Great-Horned Tragoth is not a valid standalone anchor. Key gate: sparing Patches at the Murkwater boss fight; killing him there ends the quest and drops Patches' Bell Bearing for the Twin Maiden Husks. Time-sensitive: claim the Magma Whip Candlestick from Patches before he leaves Volcano Manor (he departs after Rykard/the God-Devouring Serpent is slain), or it is lost. Tragoth drops the Bull-Goat set; the Magma Whip Candlestick is Patches' separate reward for the contract. Do NOT attack Patches at the Shaded Castle. Verified against Fextralife and Game8 (June 2026).

name: Sorceress Sellen

steps.title: Find Sellen in the Waypoint Ruins
steps.desc: Descend into the cellar at the Waypoint Ruins in eastern Limgrave, defeat the Mad Pumpkin Head guarding the door, then open it to meet Sorceress Sellen and become her apprentice.

steps.title: Accept Sellen's task to find Azur
steps.desc: Exhaust Sellen's dialogue and accept her request to seek the Primeval Sorcerers, beginning with Azur in Mt. Gelmir.

steps.title: Learn Comet Azur from Primeval Sorcerer Azur
steps.desc: Travel to the Hermit Village area on Mt. Gelmir and interact with the seated Primeval Sorcerer Azur to receive the Comet Azur sorcery.

steps.title: Report Azur's fate back to Sellen
steps.desc: Return to Sellen at the Waypoint Ruins, tell her of Azur, and accept her request to find Master Lusat, receiving the glintstone key needed to reach him.

steps.title: Enter Sellia Hideaway in Caelid
steps.desc: Reach the Sellia Hideaway behind Sellia, Town of Sorcery, and use Sellen's glintstone key to lower the magic barrier blocking the cave's depths.

steps.title: Learn Stars of Ruin from Primeval Sorcerer Lusat
steps.desc: Pass the illusory wall and open the sealed door deep in Sellia Hideaway, then interact with the imprisoned Primeval Sorcerer Lusat to receive the Stars of Ruin sorcery.

steps.title: Report Lusat's fate back to Sellen
steps.desc: Return to Sellen at the Waypoint Ruins and exhaust her dialogue about Lusat to advance the questline.

steps.title: Defeat Starscourge Radahn
steps.desc: Progress to Redmane Castle and defeat Starscourge Radahn, after which Sellen tasks you to meet her at Witchbane Ruins before vanishing from the Waypoint Ruins.

steps.title: Recover Sellen's Primal Glintstone
steps.desc: Travel to Witchbane Ruins in the Weeping Peninsula, descend into the cellar, and free the bound Sellen who entrusts you with Sellen's Primal Glintstone.
steps.warn: Don't fast-travel/rest while collecting the Primal Glintstone - it can kill Sellen and stall the quest. Quit to reload if she dies.  Â·  Do NOT attack Sellen here - it stalls her quest and breaks her merchant role; only Church of Vows absolution can undo it.

steps.title: Speak with Witch-Hunter Jerren at Redmane Castle
steps.desc: Return to the throne room of Redmane Castle, exhaust Witch-Hunter Jerren's dialogue about hunting Sellen, then rest at a Site of Grace to reset the area.

steps.title: Confront Jerren over Sellen at Witchbane Ruins
steps.desc: Go back to Witchbane Ruins to find Witch-Hunter Jerren standing over Sellen's broken body and exhaust his dialogue to unlock the next step.

steps.title: Find Seluvis's hidden basement at Three Sisters
steps.desc: Go to the ruins on the right of the approach up to Ranni's Rise in the Three Sisters and strike the illusory floor between the pillars to reveal Seluvis's hidden cellar.

steps.title: Transplant Sellen into the new puppet body
steps.desc: Behind the illusory wall past Seluvis's puppet, insert Sellen's Primal Glintstone into the doll to restore her, after which she sells sorceries from this spot.

steps.title: Defeat Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon
steps.desc: Clear Raya Lucaria Academy and defeat Rennala in the Grand Library to gain access to the room where Sellen's finale takes place.
steps.anchor: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon

steps.title: Confront Witch-Hunter Jerren at the Grand Library
steps.desc: Return to the Raya Lucaria Grand Library to find Sellen confronted by Witch-Hunter Jerren, with two summon signs near the boss-room doors that decide her fate.

steps.title: Ending A - Aid Sellen against Jerren
steps.desc: Use the gold summon sign to help Sellen defeat Witch-Hunter Jerren, after which she rewards you with the Glintstone Kris dagger and adds the Shard Spiral sorcery to her shop.

steps.title: Ending A - Claim the Eccentric Set and Crown
steps.desc: After the victory Sellen becomes a School of Graven Mages mass dropping the Witch's Glintstone Crown beside her, and looting the defeated Jerren's corpse yields the Eccentric armor set.

steps.title: Ending B - Side with Jerren and kill Sellen
steps.desc: Alternatively use the red summon sign to slay Sorceress Sellen for the Witch's Glintstone Crown, Sellen's Bell Bearing, and a Rune Arc, then speak to Jerren for an Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone.
steps.warn: Siding with Jerren (red sign) permanently locks Lusat's Set, Azur's Set, Glintstone Kris and Shard Spiral until NG+. Pick the gold sign to keep them.

notes: Corrected and verified against Fextralife, GameRant, GamesRadar, GameSpot, and the Fandom wiki. Key fixes to the draft: (1) Added the previously MISSING required step where you must speak to Witch-Hunter Jerren in the Redmane Castle throne room, rest to reset the area, then return to Witchbane Ruins to find Jerren over Sellen's body and exhaust his dialogue â€” this gates progression to the Three Sisters transplant. (2) Sellen's key is given when you REPORT Azur (used to drop the magic barrier at Sellia Hideaway), not handed at the start. (3) Added the Rune Arc to the Ending B (kill Sellen) reward list, which the draft omitted. (4) Clarified Ending A: Sellen transforms into a School of Graven Mages mass that drops the Witch's Glintstone Crown on the floor beside her, and the Eccentric Set is looted from Jerren's corpse. The Witch's Glintstone Crown is confirmed obtainable in BOTH endings. Unchanged and verified correct: Azur (Hermit Village area, Mt. Gelmir) grants Comet Azur; Lusat (deep in Sellia Hideaway behind illusory wall + sealed door) grants Stars of Ruin; defeating Starscourge Radahn triggers her relocation; transplant occurs in Seluvis's hidden cellar at the Three Sisters via the illusory floor; Rennala must be defeated to access the Grand Library finale; Ending A rewards Glintstone Kris + Shard Spiral. Sources: eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Sorceress+Sellen, gamerant.com, gamesradar.com, gamespot.com, eldenring.fandom.com.

name: Hyetta (Frenzied Flame)

steps.title: Progress Irina and Edgar's quest to unlock Hyetta
steps.desc: Deliver Irina's letter to Castellan Edgar and progress their questline so Edgar witnesses Irina's corpse, the trigger that makes Hyetta appear in Liurnia.
steps.warn: Talk to Irina first - killing her before getting her letter permanently stops Hyetta from ever appearing.

steps.title: Obtain the first Shabriri Grape in Stormveil Castle
steps.desc: After defeating Godrick the Grafted, descend into the basement beneath his throne room to collect the first Shabriri Grape.

steps.title: Feed Hyetta her first grape at Lake-Facing Cliffs
steps.desc: Find the blind Hyetta near the cliffside and give her the first Shabriri Grape, earning the 'As You Wish' gesture.

steps.title: Feed Hyetta her second grape at Purified Ruins
steps.desc: Find Hyetta at Purified Ruins and give her a second Shabriri Grape obtained from the hidden lower level there, reached by breaking the wooden planks covering a staircase.

steps.title: Kill Edgar the Revenger for a Shabriri Grape
steps.desc: Defeat Edgar the Revenger at Revenger's Shack on the western edge of Liurnia to claim the third Shabriri Grape.

steps.title: Feed Hyetta her third grape near Gate Town Bridge
steps.desc: Give Hyetta the third Shabriri Grape where she waits near Gate Town Bridge, then choose the dialogue telling her the grapes are truly human eyes to advance the quest.

steps.title: Defeat Festering Fingerprint Vyke for the Fingerprint Grape
steps.desc: Travel to the Church of Inhibition in northeastern Liurnia, survive Vyke's Bloody Finger invasion, and take the Fingerprint Grape he drops.

steps.title: Give Hyetta the Fingerprint Grape at Bellum Church
steps.desc: Bring the Fingerprint Grape to Hyetta at Bellum Church in northeastern Liurnia, after which she thanks you and departs.

steps.title: Accept the Three Fingers' flame
steps.desc: Descend beneath Leyndell to the Frenzied Flame Proscription, exhaust Hyetta's dialogue, strip off all armor and weapons, then pass through the sealed door and accept the Three Fingers.
steps.warn: Accepting the flame locks you into the Frenzied Flame ending; only undoable via Miquella's Needle (requires beating Malenia).  Â·  Accept it BEFORE the Forge of the Giants cutscene to spare Melina; doing so after changes the burning-Erdtree outcome.

steps.title: Speak with Hyetta to complete the quest and claim the reward
steps.desc: After accepting the flame, talk to Hyetta again at the Frenzied Flame Proscription, and the Frenzied Flame Seal plus five Frenzyflame Stones appear to complete her questline.

steps.title: Pick up the Frenzied Flame Seal
steps.desc: Collect the Frenzied Flame Seal that appears on the ground, the unique sacred seal scaling with Faith, Strength, and Dexterity that boosts Frenzied Flame incantations.

notes: Prerequisite: progress Irina of Morne's and Castellan Edgar's questlines so that Edgar witnesses Irina's corpse on the Weeping Peninsula; do NOT kill Irina, or Hyetta will not spawn. Also note the first Shabriri Grape sits in the basement beneath Godrick's throne room, which is only accessible after beating Godrick the Grafted. Feed her three Shabriri Grapes in order at Lake-Facing Cliffs, Purified Ruins, and Gate Town Bridge; the second grape is in the hidden lower level of Purified Ruins behind breakable wooden planks. At the third feeding (Gate Town Bridge) you MUST choose the dialogue that the grapes are human eyes, then reload the area for her to move to Bellum Church. The Fingerprint Grape comes from Festering Fingerprint Vyke, who invades near the Church of Inhibition; give it to her at Bellum Church. Final reward (Frenzied Flame Seal + 5 Frenzyflame Stones) only appears after accepting the Three Fingers at the Frenzied Flame Proscription beneath Leyndell's Subterranean Shunning-Grounds and speaking to Hyetta there. WARNING: accepting the Three Fingers locks you onto the Lord of Frenzied Flame ending unless cured later via Miquella's Needle. Verified against Fextralife (eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Hyetta) and Game8; draft corrections: prerequisite now reflects Edgar's corpse-witness trigger (not Irina's quest alone), second grape source corrected from a chest to the hidden staircase behind breakable planks, and the duplicate final-reward steps consolidated.

name: Latenna the Albinauric

steps.title: Find Albus at the Village of the Albinaurics
steps.desc: Travel to the Village of the Albinaurics in western Liurnia and walk up the path from the grace past the Depraved Perfumer to find Albus hiding disguised as a large pot.

steps.title: Reveal Albus and receive the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right)
steps.desc: Strike the disguised pot to reveal Albus and speak with him to obtain the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right), the key item needed to win Latenna's trust.

steps.title: Clear the Lakeside Crystal Cave
steps.desc: Enter the Lakeside Crystal Cave on the southern shore of Liurnia and fight through its depths to defeat the Bloodhound Knight boss guarding the far exit.

steps.title: Reach the Slumbering Wolf's Shack
steps.desc: Pass through the boss arena to emerge in a secluded clearing and rest at the Slumbering Wolf's Shack Site of Grace.

steps.title: Meet Latenna and show the medallion
steps.desc: Approach Latenna seated beside the shack with her wolf Lobo and present the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right) to earn her trust.
steps.warn: Do NOT kill Latenna at the shack - she drops no spirit ash, permanently losing the summon and the Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone reward.

steps.title: Hear Latenna's request and accept her
steps.desc: Exhaust Latenna's dialogue as she asks to be shown the way to Miquella's Haligtree and mentions the medallion's other half, then accept her into your service.

steps.title: Obtain the Latenna spirit ash
steps.desc: Receive the Latenna the Albinauric spirit summon from her, allowing you to carry her spirit across the Lands Between.
steps.warn: Recruit Latenna and grab her spirit ash BEFORE taking the Grand Lift of Rold into the Consecrated Snowfield, or the quest breaks.

steps.title: Bring Latenna to the Apostate Derelict
steps.desc: Travel to the Apostate Derelict in the northwest of the Consecrated Snowfield where a giant slumbering Albinauric woman rests.

steps.title: Summon Latenna at the Apostate Derelict
steps.desc: Summon the Latenna spirit beside the giant Albinauric woman and exhaust the resulting dialogue to complete her journey home.

steps.title: Receive the Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone
steps.desc: Claim the Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone given by Latenna as the reward for fulfilling her final wish.

notes: Verified against Fextralife, Fandom, and Game8; the draft was largely correct with only minor wording fixes. Albus is found in the Village of the Albinaurics (western Liurnia) by walking UP the path from the grace, past the Depraved Perfumer, disguised as a large pot you must strike to reveal; he gives the Haligtree Secret Medallion (Right). The Lakeside Crystal Cave boss is a generic "Bloodhound Knight" (drops the Cerulean Amber Medallion) â€” this is NOT the canonical-list "Bloodhound Knight Darriwil" (who is at the Forlorn Hound Evergaol), so this step is correctly anchored to the cave grace rather than a boss. Defeating it opens the path to the Slumbering Wolf's Shack where Latenna sits with her wolf Lobo; show the Right medallion to recruit her as the Latenna the Albinauric spirit summon. She references the medallion's other (Left) half, which is found in a chest past Commander Niall at Castle Sol in the Mountaintops of the Giants; obtaining BOTH halves is required to reach the Consecrated Snowfield, but the Left medallion is NOT part of Latenna's quest and is intentionally omitted as a step. The quest concludes at the Apostate Derelict, northwest of the Consecrated Snowfield, by summoning her beside the giant Albinauric woman; the reward is a Somber Ancient Dragon Smithing Stone (upgrades a somber weapon to +9). NOTE: contrary to one secondary source's warning, recruiting Latenna and obtaining the Left medallion do not conflict â€” her death warning is not supported by the primary wikis and was excluded. Sources: Fextralife (https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Latenna), Fandom (https://eldenring.fandom.com/wiki/Latenna_the_Albinauric), Game8 (https://game8.co/games/Elden-Ring/archives/369889).

name: Diallos and Jarburg
notes: Quest order verified against Fextralife (Diallos, Jar Bairn, Jarburg). Critical gate: do NOT complete the Volcano Manor legacy dungeon (defeat Rykard) before speaking to Diallos on the sunken roof in northern Liurnia, or he will not appear there and the quest locks. Diallos leaves Volcano Manor after you accept the SECOND assassination Letter (target Rileigh the Idle) OR after you defeat Rykard, whichever comes first. He only relocates to Jarburg after you have begun progressing Jar-Bairn's quest. His death is triggered by progressing the world: defeat Starscourge Radahn and exhaust Alexander, Warrior Jar's dialogue in the Wailing Dunes arena, then rest at the Starscourge Radahn Site of Grace and return to Jarburg; exhausting both Diallos's and Jar-Bairn's dialogue then triggers the poacher attack (a reload to the title screen may be needed). Diallos's corpse vanishes on reload, dropping Hoslow's Petal Whip, Diallos's Mask, and a Numen's Rune. After looting and exhausting Jar-Bairn's grief dialogue, giving Alexander's Innards (from completing Alexander's questline in Crumbling Farum Azula) to Jar-Bairn closes the combined questline and yields the Companion Jar talisman. Rest-and-return resets at the Jarburg Site of Grace are required between most Jar-Bairn dialogue steps.

steps.title: Meet Diallos at the Roundtable Hold
steps.desc: Speak with Knight Diallos at the Roundtable Hold, where he frets over his missing servant Lanya and asks you to keep an eye out for her.

steps.title: Find Diallos in northern Liurnia
steps.desc: Track Diallos to a sunken rooftop north and slightly west of the Academy Gate Town grace and speak with him before ever completing Volcano Manor.
steps.warn: Do this BEFORE completing Volcano Manor. If you finish the Manor first, Diallos never appears here and the quest is permanently lost.

steps.title: Hear Diallos's plan back at the Roundtable
steps.desc: Return to the Roundtable Hold and speak with Diallos, who reveals he has traced the Recusants and intends to infiltrate them.

steps.title: Find Diallos at Volcano Manor
steps.desc: Reach Volcano Manor and find Diallos in the drawing room alongside Bernahl, then exhaust his dialogue.

steps.title: Complete the first assassination Letter
steps.desc: Take the first Letter from Volcano Manor and slay Old Knight Istvan, then return to hear Diallos grow more disillusioned.

steps.title: Accept the second Letter to make Diallos leave
steps.desc: Accept the second Letter from Volcano Manor targeting Rileigh the Idle, after which a despairing Diallos abandons the Manor.

steps.title: Defeat Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy
steps.desc: Slay Rykard within Volcano Manor to conclude the Manor chapter, which alternatively also forces Diallos to leave.

steps.title: Meet Jar-Bairn in Jarburg
steps.desc: Travel to Jarburg, southeast of the Artist's Shack in Liurnia, and speak with Jar-Bairn about his wish to become a Potentate.
steps.warn: Never attack or destroy the living jars in Jarburg - doing so angers Jar-Bairn and permanently breaks this questline.

steps.title: Exhaust Jar-Bairn's dialogue and reset
steps.desc: Repeatedly rest at the Jarburg Site of Grace and re-speak with Jar-Bairn to advance his dialogue toward Diallos's arrival.

steps.title: Find Diallos kneeling as the new Potentate
steps.desc: After resetting Jarburg, discover Diallos tending a jar inside a hut at the end of the village as its new Potentate.

steps.title: Optional: meet Alexander at the Radahn arena
steps.desc: Optionally visit Starscourge Radahn's arena at the Wailing Dunes to exhaust Alexander, Warrior Jar's dialogue. This is not required for Jarburg - only Rykard's defeat (step 7) matters; the poacher attack triggers from exhausting Diallos's and Jar-Bairn's dialogue and reloading the area at night.

steps.title: Rest at the Starscourge Radahn grace and return
steps.desc: Rest at the Starscourge Radahn Site of Grace and travel back to Jarburg, then exhaust both Diallos's and Jar-Bairn's dialogue to set off the poacher attack.
steps.warn: Poacher attack only triggers after Radahn is defeated and Alexander's dialogue exhausted; needs nighttime plus a map reload (grace rest/fast travel).

steps.title: Witness Diallos's last stand
steps.desc: Return to a ransacked Jarburg and speak with the fatally wounded Diallos amid the smashed jars as he asks whether he protected the village.

steps.title: Mourn Diallos with Jar-Bairn
steps.desc: Rest at the grace and return to speak with Jar-Bairn grieving beside Diallos's fallen body.

steps.title: Collect Diallos's bequest
steps.desc: After reloading, claim the items left where Diallos fell, including Hoslow's Petal Whip, Diallos's Mask, and a Numen's Rune.

steps.title: Give Alexander's Innards to Jar-Bairn
steps.desc: Hand Jar-Bairn the Alexander's Innards earned from Alexander's questline in Crumbling Farum Azula to close the tale and receive the Companion Jar talisman.
steps.warn: Requires completing Alexander's full quest into Crumbling Farum Azula. Miss Alexander's questline and you forfeit the Companion Jar talisman.

name: Boc the Seamster

steps.title: Find the talking tree in Limgrave
steps.desc: East of the Birdseye Telescope south of Agheel Lake North, strike the small talking tree to break the spell and free Boc the Seamster, who rewards you with 10 Mushrooms.

steps.title: Find Boc injured at Coastal Cave
steps.desc: Travel to the Coastal Cave on Limgrave's western shore and speak with the wounded Boc lying outside the entrance.

steps.title: Defeat the Demi-Human Chiefs
steps.desc: Enter the Coastal Cave and defeat the duo of Demi-Human Chiefs guarding Boc's stolen belongings.

steps.title: Obtain the Sewing Needle and Tailoring Tools
steps.desc: Claim the Sewing Needle and Tailoring Tools dropped after the Demi-Human Chief fight.

steps.title: Return the tools to Boc
steps.desc: Give the Sewing Needle and Tailoring Tools back to Boc outside the cave so he becomes your seamster, then rest at a grace to send him onward.

steps.title: Reunite with Boc in Liurnia
steps.desc: Find Boc at the Lake-Facing Cliffs in Liurnia of the Lakes and speak with him to unlock free garment alterations.

steps.title: Acquire the Gold Sewing Needle
steps.desc: Obtain the Gold Sewing Needle from the Church of Vows in eastern Liurnia, the special needle Boc longs to work with.

steps.title: Give Boc the Gold Sewing Needle at East Raya Lucaria Gate
steps.desc: Meet Boc again near the East Raya Lucaria Gate and give him the Gold Sewing Needle, which he marvels at as a royal-crested treasure.
steps.warn: Boc only alters demigod armor, so the Gold Needle path needs legendary/demigod armor in your inventory (e.g. Radahn's) to progress.

steps.title: Find Boc at Altus Highway Junction
steps.desc: Progress to the Altus Plateau and find Boc resting at the Altus Highway Junction Site of Grace.

steps.title: Meet Boc in Leyndell
steps.desc: Reach Leyndell, Royal Capital and find Boc at the East Capital Rampart Site of Grace, where he despairs over his demi-human appearance and asks for a Larval Tear to be reborn.
steps.warn: After burning the Erdtree, Boc's map icon vanishes; he's still at East Capital Rampart - go there and re-light the grace to continue.

steps.title: Obtain the You're Beautiful Prattling Pate
steps.desc: Collect the "You're Beautiful" Prattling Pate from Hermit Village on Mount Gelmir to save Boc from his fatal wish.

steps.title: Tell Boc he is beautiful
steps.desc: At the East Capital Rampart, play the "You're Beautiful" Prattling Pate so Boc hears his mother's voice, then agree that he is beautiful, sparing him and keeping him as your loyal seamster.
steps.warn: Do NOT give Boc the Larval Tear he asks for - it kills him permanently. Only the 'You're Beautiful' Prattling Pate saves him.

notes: Corrections made: (1) First encounter is NOT deep in Mistwood â€” the talking tree is east of the Birdseye Telescope south of Agheel Lake North in Limgrave (near Murkwater Bridge); re-anchored to Boc with near hint Agheel Lake North, and added the 10 Mushrooms reward. (2) Fixed the Gold Sewing Needle's role: it is GIVEN to Boc to advance his quest (he covets the royal-crested needle), not a player tool for reinforcing armor â€” the old description was factually wrong. (3) Fixed the Prattling Pate location: it is in Hermit Village on Mt. Gelmir (near the Craftsman's Shack grace), not "Hermit's Shack." Order verified correct: Tree -> Coastal Cave -> Lake-Facing Cliffs -> East Raya Lucaria Gate -> Altus Highway Junction -> East Capital Rampart; the Demi-Human Chiefs are a duo. Tragic alternative: if you give Boc a Larval Tear instead, he travels to Rennala's chamber at the Academy of Raya Lucaria, is reborn as a human, and dies after the next rest; if you do nothing he relocates and dies. The "You're Beautiful" branch is the only way to save him. Boc relocates each time you rest after exhausting his dialogue, gated by main-game progression. Neither final choice grants an item reward; it is purely a moral choice over Boc's fate.

name: Roderika
notes: Roderika moves from Stormhill Shack to Roundtable Hold and becomes a Spirit Tuner working beside Smithing Master Hewg, enabling Spirit Ash upgrades. She gives the Spirit Jellyfish Ashes and the Chrysalids' quest at the FIRST Stormhill Shack meeting (not after the Memento); delivering the Chrysalids' Memento triggers her relocation to Roundtable Hold, where she rewards a Golden Seed. The Hewg dialogue chain is what makes her the Spirit Tuner, and the Curtsy gesture requires upgrading any Spirit Ash to +4. To make her relocate after each progression step, rest at and fast travel between Sites of Grace. Sources: Fextralife (eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Roderika), Game8 (game8.co/games/Elden-Ring/archives/369055).

steps.title: Meet Roderika at Stormhill Shack
steps.desc: Find the frightened Roderika inside Stormhill Shack and exhaust her dialogue to learn she is searching for her lost comrades.

steps.title: Receive the Sitting Sideways gesture
steps.desc: Continue speaking with Roderika until she shares her grief and grants you the Sitting Sideways gesture.

steps.title: Receive the Spirit Jellyfish Ashes and quest
steps.desc: Speak to Roderika once more so she hands over the Spirit Jellyfish Ashes and asks you to seek the fate of her Chrysalids.

steps.title: Retrieve the Chrysalids' Memento
steps.desc: Pick up the Chrysalids' Memento from the pile of corpses near the Rampart Tower in Stormveil Castle.
steps.warn: Grab this before resting at any Liurnia grace or beating Godrick - either moves Roderika to the Hold and locks out her Golden Seed.

steps.title: Deliver the Memento to Roderika
steps.desc: Return to Stormhill Shack and show Roderika the Chrysalids' Memento, prompting her to lament the Chrysalids' fate and relocate to the Roundtable Hold.
steps.warn: Deliver before she relocates. If she moves to the Hold via a Liurnia grace or beating Godrick first, the Golden Seed is lost for good.

steps.title: Find Roderika at Roundtable Hold
steps.desc: Travel to the Roundtable Hold and speak with the relocated Roderika by the fireplace, who rewards you with a Golden Seed.

steps.title: Ask Hewg about Roderika
steps.desc: Speak to Smithing Master Hewg in the Roundtable Hold and ask about Roderika to learn she has a gift for spirit tuning.

steps.title: Tell Roderika what Hewg said
steps.desc: Return to Roderika and relay Hewg's words, encouraging her to pursue her latent talent.

steps.title: Convince Hewg to teach her
steps.desc: Speak to Hewg once more to convince him that Roderika wishes to learn, then rest and fast travel so she relocates to his smithing room.

steps.title: Roderika becomes the Spirit Tuner
steps.desc: Speak to Roderika, Spirit Tuner beside Hewg, where she can now upgrade your Spirit Ashes using Grave and Ghost Glovewort.

steps.title: Receive the Curtsy gesture
steps.desc: After upgrading any Spirit Ash to +4, speak with Roderika again to hear of her newfound confidence and receive the Curtsy gesture.

name: D, Hunter of the Dead

steps.title: Meet D in Limgrave
steps.desc: Find D, Hunter of the Dead mourning a corpse just east of Stormhill Shack, where he warns that the nearby Summonwater Village has been touched by Death.
steps.warn: D can ONLY be killed here in Limgrave. Once he moves to Roundtable Hold, killing him for the early Twinned Set is impossible forever.

steps.title: Clear Summonwater Village
steps.desc: Travel to Summonwater Village and defeat the Tibia Mariner who is raising Those Who Live in Death.

steps.title: Speak with D after the hunt
steps.desc: Return to the southwestern entrance of Summonwater Village to hear D commend your slaying of the deathly horde.

steps.title: Reunite with D at Roundtable Hold
steps.desc: Rest at the Roundtable Hold and find D, where he explains his crusade against Those Who Live in Death.

steps.title: Show D a Deathroot
steps.desc: Present any Deathroot to D at the Roundtable Hold so he directs you to Gurranq at the Bestial Sanctum.

steps.title: Deliver Deathroot to Gurranq
steps.desc: Take the sending gate to the Bestial Sanctum and feed Deathroot to Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman, for his rewards.

steps.title: Accept the Weathered Dagger from Fia
steps.desc: During Fia's questline at the Roundtable Hold, accept the Weathered Dagger she asks you to return to its owner.

steps.title: Give the Weathered Dagger to D
steps.desc: Hand the Weathered Dagger to D at the Roundtable Hold, who recognizes its owner and promises to return it.
steps.warn: Hand over the Weathered Dagger BEFORE reaching Crumbling Farum Azula. Arriving there auto-kills D and locks the dagger hand-off.

steps.title: Discover D slain by Fia
steps.desc: After advancing Fia's quest and reloading, find D's corpse in a newly opened room behind Smithing Master Hewg, slain by Fia for hunting Those Who Live in Death.

steps.title: Loot the Twinned Set and Bell Bearing
steps.desc: Collect the unaltered Twinned Set and D's Bell Bearing from his body in the newly opened room at the Roundtable Hold.

steps.title: Reach Nokron, Eternal City
steps.desc: Progress Ranni's quest to defeat Starscourge Radahn and descend into Nokron, the Eternal City revealed by the falling star.

steps.title: Find D's twin brother in Nokron
steps.desc: Travel through the Siofra Aqueduct to find D's brother Devin just outside the Valiant Gargoyles arena, who teaches the Inner Order gesture on interaction.

steps.title: Give the unaltered Twinned armor to the brother
steps.desc: Hand over the complete, unaltered Twinned Set to Devin outside the Valiant Gargoyles arena so he dons it to avenge D.
steps.warn: The full Twinned Set must be UNALTERED in your inventory. If any piece is altered, Devin refuses it and the Inseparable Sword path is blocked.  Â·  Giving Devin the armor ends Fia's questline with her death; if Fia is unavailable you can't reclaim the Twinned Set until much later progression.

steps.title: Confront the brother over Fia's body
steps.desc: After defeating Lichdragon Fortissax in Fia's dream and obtaining the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince, find D's armored brother standing over the slain Fia in Deeproot Depths.

steps.title: Claim the Inseparable Sword
steps.desc: Rest at the grace so the brother departs, then take the Inseparable Sword he leaves beside Fia's body in Deeproot Depths.

notes: Verified against Fextralife Elden Ring Wiki (D, Hunter of the Dead; D's Twin Brother; Twinned Set/Armor) and supporting guides. Corrections from draft: (1) The Nokron brother (Devin / "D, Beholder of Death") is found east of the Great Waterfall Basin grace, against the railing just outside the Valiant Gargoyle arena in the Siofra Aqueduct â€” the draft's "Aqueduct-Facing Cliffs" is a real but wrong grace (that one sits near the Nokron entry, not the gargoyle arena), so steps 12-13 now use "Great Waterfall Basin." (2) The Inner Order gesture is taught simply by interacting with Devin at his initial location, not by giving the armor â€” wording clarified. (3) Added that the confrontation over Fia's body in Deeproot Depths requires having defeated Lichdragon Fortissax AND obtaining the Mending Rune of the Death-Prince (Fia's quest completion gate). Confirmed accurate: D first found east of Stormhill Shack (nearest graces Saintsbridge / Summonwater); Tibia Mariner is the Summonwater boss; D reappears at the SW entrance of Summonwater before moving to Roundtable; Deathroot -> Gurranq order; Weathered Dagger from Fia then given to D; D's body and loot (full Twinned Set helm/armor/gauntlets/greaves PLUS D's Bell Bearing) appear in the room behind Hewg after Fia's trigger and a reload. Branch note: the Twinned Set must be UNALTERED in inventory or Devin refuses it; giving it lets you summon Devin for the Valiant Gargoyles fight and ultimately yields the Inseparable Sword (Holy greatsword) after Fia's quest resolves. Sources: https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/D,+Hunter+of+the+Dead ; https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/D's+Twin+Brother ; https://eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Twinned+Set

name: Kenneth Haight

steps.title: Meet Kenneth on the highway
steps.desc: Find Kenneth Haight shouting atop a ruined archway in northeastern Limgrave just northeast of the Mistwood Outskirts grace, where he asks you to retake Fort Haight.

steps.title: Clear Fort Haight's battlements
steps.desc: Travel to Fort Haight southeast of the Mistwood Ruins and defeat the Godrick Knight on the ramparts, who drops the Ash of War: Bloody Slash.

steps.title: Report back and claim your reward
steps.desc: Return to Kenneth at the archway, where he rewards you with the Erdsteel Dagger and offers to take you into his service.

steps.title: Obtain the Erdsteel Dagger
steps.desc: Receive the Erdsteel Dagger from Kenneth as your reward for retaking the fort.

steps.title: Find Kenneth occupying Fort Haight
steps.desc: After resting at a grace, find Kenneth relocated to the now Demi-Human-infested Fort Haight, where he says he must find Limgrave's true heir before knighting you.

steps.title: Give Nepheli the Stormhawk King
steps.desc: Advance Nepheli Loux's quest by giving her the Stormhawk King while never giving her Seluvis's Potion, keeping her on the path to rule Limgrave.
steps.warn: Give Nepheli the Stormhawk King at Roundtable Hold BEFORE defeating Maliketh. Beat Maliketh first and she leaves; quest can't be finished.  Â·  Never give Nepheli Seluvis's Potion. It turns her into a puppet, permanently ending her quest and Kenneth's conclusion.  Â·  Defeating Morgott moves Nepheli out of Roundtable Hold, so give her the Stormhawk King before that boss fight.

steps.title: Defeat Morgott to open Stormveil's resolution
steps.desc: Defeat Morgott, the Omen King atop Leyndell so that Nepheli's questline and Kenneth's conclusion can progress.

steps.title: Trigger the Stormveil conclusion
steps.desc: Rest at the Godrick the Grafted site of grace in Stormveil Castle to gather Kenneth and Nepheli in the throne room.

steps.title: Hear Nepheli named ruler of Limgrave
steps.desc: Speak to Kenneth in Stormveil's throne room, where he declares Nepheli Loux the new ruler of Limgrave, completing his quest.

notes: Verified against Fextralife and Game8 wikis. Kenneth first appears atop a ruined archway in northeastern Limgrave, directly northeast of the Mistwood Outskirts grace (Fextralife also references the nearby Third Church of Marika grace). Clearing Fort Haight (killing the Godrick/Lordsworn Knight on the ramparts) yields the Ash of War: Bloody Slash, and reporting back to Kenneth yields the Erdsteel Dagger. His quest then locks to Nepheli Loux: you must give her the Stormhawk King and must NOT give her Seluvis's Potion (which turns her into a puppet). After defeating Morgott and resting at the Godrick the Grafted grace in Stormveil Castle (post-patch 1.03 behavior), Kenneth and Nepheli convene in the throne room and Kenneth names Nepheli the ruler of Limgrave. Note: Kenneth promises but never actually performs the knighting ceremony; naming Nepheli ruler is the questline's true conclusion. Per Fextralife, Kenneth is technically optional for Nepheli to reach the throne, but speaking to him there is what completes HIS questline. Corrections from draft: removed the inaccurate claim that Gatekeeper Gostoc joins the throne-room gathering (only Kenneth and Nepheli are involved in Kenneth's conclusion).

name: Rya and Zorayas

steps.title: Meet Rya in Liurnia
steps.desc: Speak with Rya the Scout at the pavilion by the Birdseye Telescope between the Laskyar Ruins and Boilprawn Shack in Liurnia of the Lakes, where she asks you to recover her stolen necklace.
steps.warn: Talk to Rya here BEFORE entering Volcano Manor. Joining the Manor first permanently locks out Blackguard Big Boggart (Boiled Prawn/Crab).

steps.title: Find Blackguard Big Boggart
steps.desc: Travel north to the Boilprawn Shack and find the ruffian who took the necklace, who offers to sell you Rya's Necklace for 1,000 runes (or drops it if killed).
steps.warn: Don't kill Boggart early - doing so locks out his shop (Boiled Crab) and questline. Buying the necklace is the safe route.

steps.title: Buy Rya's Necklace
steps.desc: Choose "Give me the necklace" and purchase Rya's Necklace from Blackguard Big Boggart at the Boilprawn Shack for 1,000 runes to recover Rya's stolen pendant.

steps.title: Return the necklace to Rya
steps.desc: Bring the necklace back to Rya the Scout at her Liurnia pavilion, and she rewards you with an Invitation to Volcano Manor and asks you to meet her on the Altus Plateau.

steps.title: Obtain the Volcano Manor Invitation
steps.desc: Receive the Volcano Manor Invitation from Rya, the letter of recruitment that grants you entry into the Recusants of Volcano Manor.

steps.title: Meet Rya on the Altus Plateau
steps.desc: Find Rya the Scout at the top of the Grand Lift of Dectus (or at the lower Lux Ruins above Erdtree-Gazing Hill if you took the Ruin-Strewn Precipice route), where she teleports you directly into Volcano Manor.

steps.title: Speak to Rya in the drawing room
steps.desc: Inside Volcano Manor, talk with Rya in the drawing room near the Volcano Manor Site of Grace, where she gives you your first assassination contract.
steps.warn: Don't blitz all of Tanith's contracts at once; rushing them skips Rya's quest beats and her serpent-room dialogue.

steps.title: Complete the first assassination contract
steps.desc: Travel to the bridge near Warmaster's Shack in Limgrave and invade and defeat Old Knight Istvan to fulfill Volcano Manor's first contract.

steps.title: Discover Zorayas's true form
steps.desc: Return to Volcano Manor, rest, and enter the now-unlocked room across the corridor from the drawing room to find Rya in serpent form, where she reveals her real name, Zorayas.

steps.title: Defeat the Godskin Noble
steps.desc: Progress through Volcano Manor and slay the Godskin Noble in the Temple of Eiglay to gain access to the Serpent's Amnion.

steps.title: Collect the Serpent's Amnion
steps.desc: Take the Serpent's Amnion from the altar at the back of the Temple of Eiglay after the Godskin Noble is defeated.

steps.title: Give the Serpent's Amnion to Zorayas
steps.desc: Bring the Serpent's Amnion to Zorayas in the locked room across from the drawing room, where she despairs over her grotesque serpent origins.
steps.warn: Speak to Zorayas in her room and resolve her fate BEFORE killing Rykard. Beating Rykard first makes her vanish, leaving no reward.

steps.title: Decide Zorayas's fate
steps.desc: Choose to kill her, give her the Tonic of Forgetfulness (received from Tanith) so she returns to the manor remembering nothing, or refuse both and leave her to make peace with her nature.
steps.warn: The Tonic of Forgetfulness ending needs the Tonic from Tanith first. Finishing all contracts/Rykard before getting it can lock out that choice.

steps.title: Claim Daedicar's Woe
steps.desc: However you resolve her fate, defeat Rykard and return to obtain the Daedicar's Woe talisman (with Zorayas's Letter as well if you spared her without the tonic), a cursed talisman that increases the damage you take.
steps.warn: Reward only drops if you spoke to Zorayas in her dungeon room pre-Rykard. Defeating Rykard beforehand forfeits Daedicar's Woe and her Letter.

notes: Verified against Fextralife (eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com/Rya), Eldenpedia (eldenring.wiki.gg/wiki/Rya_the_Scout), and TheGamer. Key corrections to the draft: (1) Rya does NOT reveal her serpent form immediately on entering the manor â€” she first gives an assassination contract, and only after you defeat Old Knight Istvan (Stormhill Shack) and reload does she appear as Zorayas in the locked room ACROSS the corridor from the drawing room (not "in the drawing room" itself). I added the missing assassination-contract step and the correct reveal location. (2) The Serpent's Amnion is delivered in that same locked room near the Volcano Manor Site of Grace, not "above the Temple of Eiglay grace" â€” corrected the near hint. (3) Reward confirmed as Daedicar's Woe in all three outcomes, plus Zorayas's Letter only if you neither kill her nor use the tonic; granted after Rykard's defeat. The Count Ymir / Cathedral of Manus Metyr / Finger Ruins content is a SEPARATE Shadow of the Erdtree questline (Ymir and Jolan) and is correctly excluded. Tonic of Forgetfulness is given by Tanith. Necklace costs 1,000 runes from Blackguard Big Boggart at Boilprawn Shack.

name: Preceptor Seluvis

steps.title: Reach the Three Sisters
steps.desc: Defeat Royal Knight Loretta in Caria Manor and proceed into the Three Sisters area of northwest Liurnia.

steps.title: Begin Ranni's quest
steps.desc: Enter Ranni's Rise and speak with Ranni the Witch to join her service, which introduces the projections of Iji, Blaidd, and Seluvis.

steps.title: Meet Seluvis's spectral form
steps.desc: After speaking with Ranni, talk to the spectral image of Preceptor Seluvis on the ground floor of Ranni's Rise, who asks you to visit him in person.

steps.title: Visit Seluvis's Rise
steps.desc: Go to Seluvis's Rise, the southernmost tower of the Three Sisters, and speak with Preceptor Seluvis to receive the potion task.

steps.title: Receive Seluvis's Potion
steps.desc: Accept Seluvis's Potion, which he tasks you with secretly administering to Nepheli Loux.

steps.title: Give the potion to Nepheli Loux
steps.desc: After defeating the Omenkiller in the Village of the Albinaurics and speaking to Gideon about Nepheli's Despair, give Seluvis's Potion to Nepheli Loux, Warrior at the Roundtable Hold so she is turned into a puppet.
steps.warn: Only puppetizing Nepheli here yields the Nepheli Loux Puppet later. Giving the potion to Gideon or Dung Eater instead loses it permanently.

steps.title: Find the hidden puppet workshop
steps.desc: Strike the illusory floor of the ruins between Ranni's Rise and Renna's Rise to reveal Seluvis's secret laboratory full of puppets.

steps.title: Confront Seluvis and claim a free puppet
steps.desc: Return to Seluvis, select the chambers dialogue to confront him, and receive one free puppet Spirit Ash (Finger Maiden Therolina Puppet or Jarwight Puppet).

steps.title: Buy a Weathered Map from Pidia
steps.desc: Follow the clifftop above Caria Manor southwest to reach Pidia, Carian Servant and purchase the Weathered Map revealing the amber light's location.
steps.warn: Buy the Weathered Map and any wanted puppets from Pidia before step 14; giving Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade kills both Seluvis and Pidia.

steps.title: Obtain the Amber Starlight
steps.desc: Travel to the ravine northeast of the Altus Highway Junction and pick up the Amber Starlight in front of the statue.

steps.title: Deliver the Amber Starlight to Seluvis
steps.desc: Bring the Amber Starlight back to Preceptor Seluvis at Seluvis's Rise.

steps.title: Receive the Magic Scorpion Charm
steps.desc: Seluvis rewards you with the Magic Scorpion Charm talisman for delivering the Amber Starlight.
steps.warn: Deliver the Amber Starlight and claim the Magic Scorpion Charm before giving Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade (step 14), which kills Seluvis and locks this reward.

steps.title: Receive the Amber Draught (optional betrayal)
steps.desc: Speak with Seluvis again to receive the Amber Draught he wants administered to Ranni; do NOT give it to her unless you intend to betray and lock out her quest.
steps.warn: Giving Ranni the Amber Draught locks her quest (recover only via Church of Vows absolution). Giving the Fingerslayer Blade first removes this betrayal option entirely.

steps.title: Advance Ranni's quest to its trigger
steps.desc: Continue Ranni's questline and obtain the Fingerslayer Blade from the chest in Nokron, Eternal City, ignoring Seluvis's request to poison Ranni.

steps.title: Give the Fingerslayer Blade to Ranni
steps.desc: Hand the Fingerslayer Blade to Ranni the Witch, which advances her quest and triggers Seluvis's death.

steps.title: Loot Seluvis's corpse
steps.desc: Find Preceptor Seluvis dead at Seluvis's Rise and take the Preceptor's armor set and Seluvis's Bell Bearing, buying any remaining puppets from his body.

steps.title: Claim the Nepheli Loux Puppet from Pidia
steps.desc: Return to Caria Manor where Pidia, Carian Servant now lies dead, slain by his own puppets, and collect Pidia's Bell Bearing and the Nepheli Loux Puppet.
steps.warn: Pidia only dies and drops the Nepheli Loux Puppet if you turned Nepheli into a puppet in step 5; otherwise this reward is unobtainable.

notes: Seluvis is tied into Ranni the Witch's questline; meeting him requires defeating Royal Knight Loretta in Caria Manor and reaching the Three Sisters, then joining Ranni at Ranni's Rise. WARNING: attacking Seluvis, or feeding the Amber Draught to Ranni, locks out Ranni's questline unless absolved with a Celestial Dew at the Church of Vows. The free puppet is your choice of the Finger Maiden Therolina Puppet or the Jarwight Puppet; additional puppets are bought with Starlight Shards. Giving Seluvis's Potion to Nepheli turns her into a puppet (you can instead give it to Gideon to discard harmlessly, or to the Dung Eater). Seluvis dies once you give Ranni the Fingerslayer Blade; Pidia dies at the same trigger, dropping Pidia's Bell Bearing plus the Nepheli Loux Puppet (if Nepheli drank the potion) or the Dolores the Sleeping Arrow Puppet (if she did not). Seluvis's corpse yields the Preceptor's armor set and Seluvis's Bell Bearing, and his puppet shop stays open via his body.

name: Thiollier

steps.title: Meet Thiollier at Pillar Path Cross
steps.desc: Speak with Thiollier where he kneels in mourning at the Pillar Path Cross Site of Grace in Scadu Altus, east of Castle Ensis, and exhaust his dialogue about St. Trina to unlock his shop.

steps.title: Buy poison wares from Thiollier
steps.desc: Purchase his poison-related stock, including Trina's Lily and the Deadly Poison Perfume Bottle, while he is still stationed at Pillar Path Cross.
steps.warn: Buy his wares (Deadly Poison Perfume Bottle, Trina's Lily) now. He leaves Pillar Path Cross once Miquella's Great Rune breaks and the shop is gone.

steps.title: Receive Black Syrup from Moore
steps.desc: Speak with Moore at the Main Gate Cross near Belurat to receive the Black Syrup item needed for the optional Thiollier exchange.

steps.title: Give Black Syrup to Thiollier for his Concoction
steps.desc: Hand the Black Syrup to Thiollier at Pillar Path Cross to receive Thiollier's Concoction in return, which feeds into the Dragon Communion Priestess quest; this is part of Moore's intended quest and does not break it.
steps.warn: Get Black Syrup from Moore and give it to Thiollier before he departs Pillar Path Cross, or the Concoction exchange is lost permanently.

steps.title: Break Miquella's Great Rune
steps.desc: Defeat Messmer and Romina and approach Shadow Keep until the message "Somewhere, a great rune has broken" appears, advancing Thiollier's quest.

steps.title: Speak to Thiollier after the rune breaks
steps.desc: Return to Thiollier at Pillar Path Cross for his updated dialogue, reloading the area if he says he has something to tell you, then finish buying his wares before he departs.

steps.title: Descend Stone Coffin Fissure
steps.desc: Enter the Stone Coffin Fissure from the southern tip of the Cerulean Coast and drop down through its ledges toward the depths.

steps.title: Defeat the Putrescent Knight
steps.desc: Beat the Putrescent Knight at the bottom of the Stone Coffin Fissure to open the path to St. Trina.

steps.title: Find St. Trina at Garden of Deep Purple
steps.desc: Rest at the Garden of Deep Purple Site of Grace and approach the sleeping St. Trina amid the purple flowers at the end of the cave.

steps.title: Tell Thiollier of St. Trina's location
steps.desc: Return to Thiollier at Pillar Path Cross and choose to reveal St. Trina's whereabouts, sending him to her side.

steps.title: Speak to Thiollier beside St. Trina
steps.desc: Travel to the Garden of Deep Purple to find Thiollier now kneeling before St. Trina and exhaust his dialogue.

steps.title: Imbibe St. Trina's nectar repeatedly
steps.desc: Choose to imbibe St. Trina's nectar at the Garden of Deep Purple, dying and respawning each time, until St. Trina speaks to you on the death screen after about four imbibes.

steps.title: Pass St. Trina's words to Thiollier
steps.desc: Speak again to Thiollier at the Garden of Deep Purple to relay St. Trina's message, which he angrily refuses to believe.

steps.title: Survive Thiollier's invasion
steps.desc: Rest or imbibe the nectar once more to be invaded by Thiollier at the Garden of Deep Purple, then defeat him to make him withdraw.
steps.warn: Defeat his Garden of Deep Purple invasion BEFORE the Enir-Ilim NPC fight, or he vanishes from the cave and his quest ends early.

steps.title: Obtain St. Trina's Smile
steps.desc: Collect the St. Trina's Smile talisman granted after defeating Thiollier in his invasion.

steps.title: Burn the Sealing Tree at Church of the Bud
steps.desc: Burn the Sealing Tree at the Church of the Bud to advance the main story, the point of no return for Thiollier's questline.
