steps.warn: Burning the Sealing Tree halts all of Miquella's followers' quests. Finish Thiollier's invasion and reconciliation steps first.

steps.title: Speak to the reconciled Thiollier
steps.desc: Return to the Garden of Deep Purple to find Thiollier now calmed at St. Trina's side and exhaust his final dialogue.

steps.title: Summon Thiollier against Leda's band
steps.desc: Use Thiollier's golden summon sign before the gauntlet fight against Needle Knight Leda and her allies at Enir-Ilim.
steps.warn: You must summon him for the Leda band fight to make him summonable at the final boss; skipping it locks that out (his gear still drops).

steps.title: Summon Thiollier for the final boss
steps.desc: Summon Thiollier with his golden sign before Radahn, Consort of Miquella, to fight alongside him at the climax.

steps.title: Claim Thiollier's gear
steps.desc: After the final fight, collect Thiollier's Hidden Needle and his full armor set of Mask, Garb, Gloves, and Trousers.

notes: Thiollier is the mournful servant of St. Trina and a member of Leda's band. He starts as a poison-wares merchant at Pillar Path Cross (Scadu Altus, east of Castle Ensis), selling Trina's Lily and St. Trina's Crystal Ball. CORRECTIONS vs. the draft: (1) Added the missing Moore Black Syrup exchange â€” giving Black Syrup to Thiollier yields Thiollier's Concoction (used in the Dragon Communion Priestess quest) but FAILS Moore's questline; do this before he leaves. (2) Added the essential trigger step: Thiollier's quest only advances after Miquella's Great Rune breaks (defeat Messmer and Romina, then approach Shadow Keep for the \"a great rune has broken\" message) â€” return and speak to him again at Pillar Path Cross, reloading if needed. (3) Reordered so buying wares and the Moore/rune triggers precede the Stone Coffin Fissure descent. St. Trina sleeps at the Garden of Deep Purple grace at the end of Stone Coffin Fissure (entrance at the southern tip of Cerulean Coast), reachable after defeating the Putrescent Knight (Thiollier can be summoned for that boss). Telling Thiollier St. Trina's whereabouts sends him to her side; imbibe her nectar ~4 times until she speaks on the death screen, relay her words, then survive his invasion to earn the St. Trina's Smile talisman. Burning the Sealing Tree at Church of the Bud (requires Messmer defeated) is the point of no return â€” finish the prior steps first. Afterward speak to the reconciled Thiollier, then summon him for Needle Knight Leda's band fight and for Radahn, Consort of Miquella, at Enir-Ilim, after which he drops Thiollier's Hidden Needle plus the Mask, Garb, Gloves, and Trousers. Sources: PowerPyx, Fextralife Wiki, Game8.

name: Count Ymir, High Priest

steps.title: Reach Scadu Altus
steps.desc: Defeat Rellana, Twin Moon Knight at Castle Ensis to open the path into Scadu Altus, where the Cathedral of Manus Metyr stands.

steps.title: Meet Count Ymir
steps.desc: Speak with and fully exhaust Count Ymir's dialogue on his throne in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr to begin his quest and receive the Hole-Laden Necklace and the first Ruins Map.

steps.title: Note Jolan at the cathedral
steps.desc: Observe Swordhand of Night Jolan leaning against a pillar in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr, who stays silent until Ymir's quest progresses.

steps.title: Ring the bell at Finger Ruins of Rhia
steps.desc: Travel east along the beach from Cerulean Coast Cross to the Finger Ruins of Rhia and sound the bell among the circle of finger statues to earn the Crimson Seed Talisman +1.

steps.title: Report the first bell to Ymir
steps.desc: Return to Count Ymir in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr to receive the Beloved Stardust talisman, the second Ruins Map, and new purchasable sorceries.

steps.title: Ring the bell at Finger Ruins of Dheo
steps.desc: Reach Scaduview via the Storeroom, Back Section in Shadow Keep, use the O Mother gesture at the altar to open the path, then sound the bell at the Finger Ruins of Dheo to obtain the Cerulean Seed Talisman +1.

steps.title: Report the second bell to Ymir
steps.desc: Speak again with Count Ymir in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr to receive the third Ruins Map for the Finger Ruins of Miyr.

steps.title: Open the throne path to Miyr
steps.desc: Rest at the Cathedral of Manus Metyr grace, then examine Count Ymir's throne to reveal the hidden passage leading down into the Finger Ruins of Miyr.

steps.title: Defeat the invader Anna
steps.desc: While crossing the Finger Ruins of Miyr, defeat the invading Swordhand of Night Anna to obtain the Claws of Night.

steps.title: Blow the horn at Miyr
steps.desc: Continue through the Finger Ruins of Miyr and sound the horn at the end of the passage to be teleported to Metyr, Mother of Fingers.

steps.title: Defeat Metyr, Mother of Fingers
steps.desc: Slay Metyr, Mother of Fingers to earn the Remembrance of the Mother of Fingers, which Enia can trade for the Staff of the Great Beyond or Gazing Finger.

steps.title: Defeat the hostile Count Ymir
steps.desc: Return to the Cathedral of Manus Metyr where Ymir turns hostile, and defeat Count Ymir, Mother of Fingers to claim the Maternal Staff, the High Priest armor set, and Ymir's Bell Bearing.

steps.title: Collect Cherishing Fingers
steps.desc: Pick up the Cherishing Fingers sorcery from Ymir's grave in the small graveyard just west of the Cathedral of Manus Metyr after his defeat.

steps.title: Speak to grieving Jolan
steps.desc: Rest and return to find Swordhand of Night Jolan slumped at her pillar in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr, where she asks for an Iris of Grace or an Iris of Occultation.

steps.title: Acquire an Iris
steps.desc: Obtain either the Iris of Grace or the Iris of Occultation to bring back to Jolan, since her finale reward depends on which one you give.

steps.title: Give the Iris to Jolan
steps.desc: Hand Swordhand of Night Jolan the Iris of Occultation to receive the Sword of Night and end her quest, or the Iris of Grace to receive the Swordhand of Night Jolan spirit ashes.
steps.warn: Mutually exclusive: Iris of Occultation = Sword of Night (kills Jolan); Iris of Grace = Jolan spirit ashes. You get only one per playthrough.  Â·  Giving Iris of Occultation kills Jolan, permanently locking out her spirit ashes and the upgraded Jolan & Anna ashes. Pick Iris of Grace to keep that path.

notes: Corrections from draft (verified vs Fextralife, GameRant, Beebom, VULKK): (1) Added missing essential step â€” the invader Swordhand of Night Anna (Jolan's sister) attacks in the Finger Ruins of Miyr and drops the Claws of Night before the horn/Metyr. (2) Fixed Dheo access: it is reached via Scaduview from the Storeroom, Back Section in Shadow Keep, requiring the O Mother gesture at the altar â€” not simply "Scaduview behind Shadow Keep." (3) Removed the inaccurate "rest until nighttime" requirement for the throne; the Miyr passage opens by resting at the grace and examining the throne after obtaining the third Ruins Map. (4) Trimmed the redundant standalone "exhaust dialogue / Greater Will" step into the first-meeting and report steps, since exhausting dialogue happens at the first meeting. Verified reward order: first meeting gives Hole-Laden Necklace + first Ruins Map; Rhia bell = Crimson Seed Talisman +1, then Ymir gives Beloved Stardust + second map; Dheo bell = Cerulean Seed Talisman +1, then Ymir gives third map; Metyr drops Remembrance of the Mother of Fingers (trade via Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold for Staff of the Great Beyond or Gazing Finger); hostile Count Ymir, Mother of Fingers drops Maternal Staff, High Priest set, and Ymir's Bell Bearing; Cherishing Fingers sorcery lies at Ymir's grave in the graveyard west of the cathedral. Jolan remains a non-hostile NPC the whole quest (she is not fought). Her finale is mutually exclusive: Iris of Occultation gives the Sword of Night and ends her quest, while Iris of Grace gives the Swordhand of Night Jolan spirit ash, which can later be reunited with Anna's puppet at the top of Rabbath's Rise for the combined Jolan and Anna spirit ashes.

name: Sir Ansbach

steps.title: Meet Sir Ansbach at Main Gate Cross
steps.desc: Speak with Sir Ansbach where he rests beside Miquella's cross at the Main Gate Cross grace and exhaust his dialogue about Mohg and the crosses.

steps.title: Report Miquella's crosses (optional)
steps.desc: Optionally find more of Miquella's crosses and return to Sir Ansbach at Main Gate Cross for extra lore dialogue.

steps.title: Approach Shadow Keep to relocate Ansbach
steps.desc: Advance into Scadu Altus and approach Shadow Keep so Miquella's great rune breaks, then speak with Sir Ansbach and rest so he leaves Main Gate Cross and relocates inside the Storehouse. Rellana, Twin Moon Knight is an optional boss on the route, not a requirement.

steps.title: Find Ansbach in the Storehouse
steps.desc: Enter Shadow Keep's Specimen Storehouse and find Sir Ansbach in a room north of the Storehouse, First Floor grace.

steps.title: Meet Redmane Freyja in the Storehouse
steps.desc: Climb to the Storehouse, Seventh Floor grace and exhaust Redmane Freyja's dialogue so you learn of her decision before involving Ansbach.
steps.warn: Must hear Freyja's decision here BEFORE handing Ansbach the Secret Rite Scroll, or he leaves first and the Letter/Golden Lion Shield is lost.

steps.title: Collect the Secret Rite Scroll
steps.desc: Retrieve the Secret Rite Scroll from a table behind tall bookshelves reached from the Storehouse, Fourth Floor grace.

steps.title: Tell Ansbach about Freyja and give the Secret Rite Scroll
steps.desc: Return to Sir Ansbach at the Storehouse, First Floor, tell him of Freyja's decision, then hand over the Secret Rite Scroll, prompting his conclusion that Miquella means to use Mohg's body as Radahn's vessel.
steps.warn: Talk to Freyja (step 5) first. Give the scroll before that and Ansbach departs, locking out the Letter for Freyja and Golden Lion Shield.

steps.title: Receive the Letter for Freyja
steps.desc: Rest at a grace and speak with Sir Ansbach again at the Storehouse, First Floor so he entrusts you with the Letter for Freyja.

steps.title: Deliver the letter to Freyja
steps.desc: Take the Letter for Freyja to Redmane Freyja at the Storehouse, Seventh Floor and give it to her, receiving the Golden Lion Shield in return.

steps.title: Return Freyja's reply to Ansbach
steps.desc: Report back to Sir Ansbach at the Storehouse, First Floor to relay Freyja's response and advance his quest.

steps.title: Exhaust Needle Knight Leda's dialogue
steps.desc: Speak with Needle Knight Leda at the Highroad Cross grace until she turns on her companions and triggers the Storehouse confrontation.

steps.title: Side with Ansbach against Leda
steps.desc: Return to Sir Ansbach's room at the Storehouse, First Floor and touch the gold summon sign to fight on his side against Needle Knight Leda, earning Ansbach's Longbow and Leda's Rune.
steps.warn: Touch the GOLD sign only. The red sign (helping Leda) permanently kills Ansbach and ends his quest and later summons.

steps.title: Burn the Sealing Tree (point of no return)
steps.desc: Progress the main story and burn the Sealing Tree at the Church of the Bud, after which the questline continues only in Enir-Ilim.
steps.warn: Finish all Ansbach steps through 12 first. Burning the Sealing Tree halts Miquella's followers' quests; it only continues in Enir-Ilim.

steps.title: Summon Ansbach against the Band of Leda
steps.desc: In Enir-Ilim, use Sir Ansbach's gold summon sign at the Cleansing Chamber Anteroom ambush to help defeat Needle Knight Leda and her allies.

steps.title: Speak with Ansbach after the ambush
steps.desc: After the Band of Leda is defeated, talk to Sir Ansbach near the Cleansing Chamber Anteroom where he praises Thiollier and steels himself for what comes next.

steps.title: Summon Ansbach for the final boss
steps.desc: Use Sir Ansbach's gold summon sign before the Promised Consort Radahn fight to battle alongside him, completing his questline.
steps.warn: His gold sign must appear outside the boss room for rewards. He need not be summoned or die; an available sign guarantees his drops.

steps.title: Collect Ansbach's rewards
steps.desc: If Sir Ansbach falls during the final battle, claim Ansbach's Set, the Obsidian Lamina scythe, and the Furious Blade of Ansbach incantation from his remains.

notes: Pureblood Knight Ansbach, former Pureblood Knight Captain of House Mohg, comes to the Land of Shadow to learn Miquella's plans for Mohg's body. Verified against PowerPyx, Game8, and Fextralife. CORRECTIONS from draft: (1) The key item is named "Letter for Freyja" (not "Letter to Freyja"). (2) Order fixed - you must meet/exhaust Redmane Freyja at Storehouse Seventh Floor BEFORE involving Ansbach; you then tell Ansbach about Freyja AND give the Secret Rite Scroll in the same visit, then rest and speak again to receive the Letter for Freyja. Giving the scroll without having learned of Freyja's decision can lock you out of the letter. (3) Added the explicit "Meet Freyja first" step and the "defeat Rellana / advance to Scadu Altus" trigger that actually relocates Ansbach from Main Gate Cross to the Storehouse (the "great rune has broken" message is not what moves him; reaching Bonny Village or Shadow Keep does). Gating: steps 1-12 (through siding with Ansbach against Leda at the Storehouse) must be completed before burning the Sealing Tree at Church of the Bud, the point of no return; the rest occurs in Enir-Ilim. Rewards: delivering the Letter for Freyja yields the Golden Lion Shield; the Storehouse invasion drops Ansbach's Longbow regardless of side, and siding with Ansbach (gold sign) additionally gives Leda's Rune. His death after the final battle drops Ansbach's Set (Wise Man's Mask, Ansbach's Attire/Manchettes/Boots), the Obsidian Lamina scythe, and the Furious Blade of Ansbach incantation. Sources: powerpyx.com, game8.co, eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com.

name: Moore
notes: Order fixes vs draft: (1) Talk to Thiollier first to open his shop, THEN get the Black Syrup from Moore, THEN return to deliver it â€” the draft had the 'obtain Black Syrup' step placed AFTER the delivery. (2) The draft's 'Moore relocates to a new camp near Recluses' River / Highroad Cross in Scadu Altus' step is not supported by PowerPyx or Fextralife and was removed; Moore stays at his Gravesite Plain spot (Pillar Path Cross / Main Gate Cross area) and the final 'Must we be sad together?' conversation happens there, NOT at Church of the Crusade. Church of the Crusade is only where the RESOLUTION (corpse / invasion) occurs after the choice. Verified correct from the draft and kept: Moore gives Forager Brood Cookbook (7) (after you obtain Cookbook (4) from the warming-stone pest), and all three endings grant the identical reward (Verdigris Helm/Armor/Gauntlets/Greaves, Verdigris Greatshield, Moore's Bell Bearing). Missable timing: the Black Syrup and Cookbook (7) must be obtained before approaching Shadow Keep, which triggers 'Somewhere, a great rune has been brokenâ€¦ And so too has a powerful charm' and advances the quest to its final dialogue; everything is fully locked out at the point of no return (burning the Sealing Tree at Church of the Bud after defeating Romina, Saint of the Bud). The Black Syrup also feeds Thiollier's and St. Trina's questlines (Thiollier's Concoction is used on the Dragon Communion Priestess), so deliver it before advancing those. Final choices: 'Put it behind you' makes Moore a hostile ally of Leda at the Enir-Ilim showdown; 'Remain sad forever' makes him take his own life, corpse found on cliffs north of Church of the Crusade; 'I don't know' leads to him invading as a red phantom near Church of the Crusade after he hunts Forager Broods. Sources: PowerPyx, Game8, Fextralife (eldenring.wiki.fextralife.com).

steps.title: Find Thiollier and open his shop
steps.desc: Travel to the Pillar Path Cross site of grace in Gravesite Plain and exhaust Thiollier's dialogue until his purchase menu becomes available.

steps.title: Meet Moore and buy from his shop
steps.desc: Find the melancholy merchant Moore seated with Sir Ansbach just outside Belurat at the Main Gate Cross site of grace and purchase any item to unlock his quest dialogue.

steps.title: Receive the Black Syrup from Moore
steps.desc: Select "Talk to Moore" to receive the Black Syrup, a black mournful liquor he asks you to deliver to his sorrowful friend Thiollier.
steps.warn: Get the Black Syrup BEFORE approaching Shadow Keep or starting Thiollier's St. Trina quest, or Moore won't hand it over this cycle.

steps.title: Deliver the Black Syrup to Thiollier
steps.desc: Return to Thiollier at Pillar Path Cross, give him the Black Syrup, then choose "Ask about black syrup" and "I'm weary of life" to obtain Thiollier's Concoction.
steps.warn: Deliver before Thiollier leaves for St. Trina and before Shadow Keep; if he relocates to Garden of Deep Purple the delivery is locked out permanently.

steps.title: Obtain Forager Brood Cookbook (4)
steps.desc: Help the warming-stone pest at the forager brood north of the Church of the Crusade in Scadu Altus to receive Forager Brood Cookbook (4), which Moore's next gift depends on.

steps.title: Collect Forager Brood Cookbook (7) from Moore
steps.desc: Return to Moore at Main Gate Cross to receive Forager Brood Cookbook (7), a reward that becomes permanently missable once his quest advances past this point.
steps.warn: Grab Cookbook (7) from Moore before the rune-break choice advances his quest; it becomes permanently inaccessible if he moves or dies.

steps.title: Break Miquella's Great Rune
steps.desc: Advance the main story by approaching Shadow Keep until the messages "Somewhere, a great rune has been broken..." and "And so too has a powerful charm" appear, unlocking Moore's final dialogue.

steps.title: Make the grim final choice
steps.desc: Speak with Moore again and answer "Must we be sad together?" by choosing "Put it behind you," "Remain sad forever," or "I don't know," each deciding his fate.
steps.warn: Picking 'Put it behind you' or 'Remain sad forever' makes Moore leave, locking out any remaining Forager Brood cookbooks for this playthrough.

steps.title: Resolve Moore's fate near Church of the Crusade
steps.desc: Depending on your choice, fight him among Leda's hostile group at Enir-Ilim, find his corpse on the cliffs north of Church of the Crusade, or face him there as a red phantom invader after he hunts the Forager Broods.
steps.warn: Finish Moore's quest before burning the Sealing Tree at Church of the Bud (after Romina) - that is the hard point of no return.

steps.title: Claim the Verdigris set and Moore's Bell Bearing
steps.desc: However the quest ends, loot Moore's full Verdigris armor set, the Verdigris Greatshield, and Moore's Bell Bearing as his final legacy.

name: Drake Warrior Igon

steps.title: Find the screaming Igon
steps.desc: From Castle Ensis head southeast to the Pillar Path Waypoint in eastern Gravesite Plain, where Drake Warrior Igon lies on the ground crying out in pain west of the grace.

steps.title: Exhaust Igon's early dialogue
steps.desc: Rest at the grace and talk to Igon repeatedly until he speaks of his vendetta against the dragon Bayle and only repeats lines about the exquisite pain.

steps.title: Descend into the Dragon's Pit
steps.desc: Take the marble-lined road south, defeat the red-named Ancient Dragon-Man invader, and work down through the Dragon's Pit dungeon toward its lower grace.

steps.title: Open the way to Jagged Peak
steps.desc: Drop down the abyss and defeat the Ancient Dragon-Man boss at the bottom of the pit to unlock the Dragon's Pit Terminus grace and the path onto the Jagged Peak.

steps.title: Commune at the Grand Altar
steps.desc: Take the right path from Dragon's Pit Terminus to the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion, speak with the Dragon Communion Priestess, and choose Devour draconic essence to receive the Ancient Dragon's Blessing.

steps.title: Clear the drakes at the peak's foot
steps.desc: Cross the bridge to the Foot of the Jagged Peak grace and slay the two feuding Jagged Peak Drakes, defeating the one with the boss health bar so Igon reappears nearby.

steps.title: Receive Igon's Furled Finger
steps.desc: Speak with Igon where he now sits amid the red smoke at the eastern canyon entrance until he gives you the Igon's Furled Finger so you can summon him against Bayle.
steps.warn: Must talk to Igon here after the Twin Drakes to get his Furled Finger - without it you cannot summon him for the Bayle fight.

steps.title: Obtain Thiollier's Concoction
steps.desc: Progress Thiollier's questline in the Shadow Keep / Church District area until he gives you Thiollier's Concoction, and do not drink it yourself.
steps.warn: Requires advancing Thiollier's quest (don't drink the concoction). It's needed for the Priestess/Florissax path before Bayle.

steps.title: Put the Priestess to sleep at night
steps.desc: Rest until nightfall, then give Thiollier's Concoction to the Dragon Communion Priestess as she prays at the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion to make her fall asleep.
steps.warn: Give the concoction only at night, and do it before defeating Bayle - this choice is permanent.

steps.title: Wait and exhaust her dreaming dialogue
steps.desc: Pass time across about two in-game days at the grace and speak with the Priestess until her dialogue about Florissax is fully exhausted, all before killing Bayle.

steps.title: Defeat Ancient Dragon Senessax
steps.desc: Head southeast and east from the Foot of the Jagged Peak past the spiritspring jumps and rolling boulders, then defeat Ancient Dragon Senessax blocking the ascent to the summit.

steps.title: Summon Igon and defeat Bayle
steps.desc: At the summit crater arena use Igon's golden summon sign just inside the fog wall and defeat Bayle the Dread with his aid across both phases.
steps.warn: Killing Bayle locks the Priestess outcome. Summon Igon and finish her concoction steps first or you forfeit Florissax rewards.

steps.title: Claim the Dragonbolt of Florissax
steps.desc: Return to the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion and speak with the Priestess, who rewards you with the Dragonbolt of Florissax incantation in place of her usual rewards.
steps.warn: Only granted if you drugged the Priestess before Bayle. Otherwise she's dead and you get Flowerstone Gavel + Priestess Heart instead.

steps.title: Collect Igon's gear at the foot of the peak
steps.desc: Travel back to the Foot of the Jagged Peak where Igon has died of his wounds and collect his full equipment set including Igon's Greatbow and Igon's Bell Bearing.

notes: Verified against PowerPyx, Fextralife (Igon, Dragonbolt of Florissax, Ancient Dragon Senessax), and Fandom/Sportskeeda. Corrections vs. draft: (1) Step 1 anchor changed from the grace "Pillar Path Waypoint" to the NPC "Drake Warrior Igon" to match type npc; the grace is now the near hint. (2) Item-type steps now anchor to the actual item names "Igon's Furled Finger" and "Dragonbolt of Florissax" instead of the literal placeholder "Item". (3) Removed the standalone "Dragon's Pit Terminus" unlock being conflated with the Ancient Dragon-Man fight â€” clarified the boss is fought after dropping down the abyss to unlock that grace. Geographic order confirmed: Dragon's Pit Terminus -> (right path) Grand Altar of Dragon Communion -> (bridge) Foot of the Jagged Peak -> Senessax on the climb -> Bayle at the summit. Igon first appears at Pillar Path Waypoint, screaming. Igon's Furled Finger is given at the Foot of the Jagged Peak (eastern canyon, red smoke) after defeating the two drakes, letting you summon him for Bayle. Devour draconic essence grants the Ancient Dragon's Blessing damage reduction. The Dragonbolt of Florissax is an OPTIONAL branch: complete Thiollier's questline for Thiollier's Concoction, give it to the Dragon Communion Priestess at NIGHT while she prays to make her sleep, wait ~2 days and exhaust her Florissax dialogue BEFORE killing Bayle, then claim Dragonbolt of Florissax from her after Bayle dies; this locks you out of her usual rewards (Priestess Heart and Flowerstone Gravel). Igon's gold summon sign is just inside the fog wall in Bayle's arena. After Bayle is slain Igon dies of his wounds at the Foot of the Jagged Peak, leaving his armor set, Igon's Greatbow, and Igon's Bell Bearing (sells Igon's Harpoons at the Twin Maiden Husks).

name: Hornsent

steps.title: Meet Hornsent in Gravesite Plain
steps.desc: Speak with the vengeful pilgrim Hornsent at the first cross and exhaust his dialogue to receive the Cross Map marking Miquella's path.

steps.title: Defeat the Divine Beast Dancing Lion
steps.desc: Clear Belurat, Tower Settlement's boss to obtain the Divine Beast Head needed for the Hornsent Grandam exchange.

steps.title: Give the Divine Beast Head to Hornsent Grandam
steps.desc: Equip the Divine Beast Head and speak to Hornsent Grandam in her room by the grace to receive the Watchful Spirit incantation.
steps.warn: Get Watchful Spirit from Grandam (Divine Beast Head equipped) BEFORE killing Messmer; afterward she won't give the incantation.

steps.title: Trade Scorpion Stew to Hornsent (optional)
steps.desc: Bring Scorpion Stew to Hornsent at the Three-Path Cross to receive three Furnace Visages in an optional exchange.

steps.title: Meet Hornsent again in Scadu Altus
steps.desc: Find Hornsent relocated to Highroad Cross north of Castle Ensis and exhaust his dialogue to receive the New Cross Map.

steps.title: Advance the story toward Shadow Keep
steps.desc: Progress to Shadow Keep, then return and rest at Highroad Cross so that Hornsent departs and Leda begins confronting him.
steps.warn: Do NOT enter Messmer's arena from the Dark Chamber grace until steps 5-9 are done; doing so removes Hornsent's and Leda's summon signs.

steps.title: Side with Hornsent against Leda
steps.desc: At the burning boats near the Main Gate Plaza, choose the gold summon sign to fight Needle Knight Leda alongside Hornsent.
steps.warn: Choosing Hornsent's gold sign permanently locks out Leda's-side rewards (Lacerating/Retaliatory Crossed-Tree, Ansbach's Longbow). Exclusive branch.

steps.title: Claim the reward for aiding Hornsent
steps.desc: After the victory, collect Ash of War: Swift Slash and Leda's Rune for siding with Hornsent.

steps.title: Summon Hornsent against Messmer
steps.desc: Use Hornsent's gold summon sign inside the boss arena to fight Messmer the Impaler together.
steps.warn: Summon Hornsent's gold sign on your FIRST entry to Messmer's arena; entering without him erases the sign and forfeits this co-op step.

steps.title: Hear Hornsent's vow of vengeance
steps.desc: Rest at Messmer's Dark Chamber and speak to Hornsent in the arena, where he vows to slay Marika and all of the Erdtree's kin.

steps.title: Defeat the invading Hornsent
steps.desc: On the rot-covered stairs before the Church of the Bud in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh, defeat Hornsent when he invades as a red phantom.

steps.title: Collect Hornsent's gear
steps.desc: Loot the Falx sword and the full Hornsent armor set from his remains to complete the questline.

notes: Corrected and verified against PowerPyx, Game8, Beebom, and TheGamer. KEY FIXES to the draft: (1) The Grandam exchange was backwards. You do NOT receive Scorpion Stew from Hornsent Grandam to carry to Hornsent. Instead you EQUIP the Divine Beast Head (dropped by Divine Beast Dancing Lion) and give it to Hornsent Grandam in her room beside the Small Private Altar grace in Belurat; she rewards the Watchful Spirit incantation (and later, after Messmer, Scorpion Stew that is meant to be consumed). (2) The Scorpion Stew -> 3x Furnace Visage trade is a SEPARATE, fully optional exchange where you give Scorpion Stew TO Hornsent at Three-Path Cross; it does not gate the quest. These were merged incorrectly in the draft. (3) Added the required intermediate step of progressing to Shadow Keep and resting at Highroad Cross so Hornsent departs and the Leda confrontation triggers. (4) Corrected the Leda fight location: it occurs at the burning boats near the Main Gate Plaza (anchored to Shadow Keep, Main Gate grace), not at the Storehouse First Floor elevator. The reward-collection step was re-anchored to match. Siding with Hornsent (GOLD sign) gives Ash of War: Swift Slash + Leda's Rune and continues the quest; siding with Leda (RED sign) ends his quest early but still drops his gear. ORDER, the Cross Map / New Cross Map items, the Messmer summon, the throne dialogue, the Church of the Bud invasion (take the first rot-infested staircase in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh), and the final drops (Falx, Caterpillar Mask, Braided Cord Robe, Braided Arm Wraps, Soiled Loincloth) are all confirmed correct. BOSS-NAME NOTE: the real boss is 'Messmer the Impaler' at the Messmer's Dark Chamber grace, but the allowed boss list only contains the (non-canonical) 'Messmer, the Omen King', which is used as the nearest available entry. If you never summon him for Messmer, he instead appears among Leda's allies at the final Enir-Ilim confrontation with the same drops. CAUTION: defeating Romina/burning the Sealing Tree advances the endgame and can lock Miquella-follower questlines, so finish Hornsent's steps beforehand.

name: Needle Knight Leda and the Band
notes: Quest spans Belurat and Castle Ensis through Scadu Altus, Shadow Keep and Enir-Ilim. Outcomes branch on whom you aid in the Hornsent and Ansbach duels and on choices in Freyja's, Moore's and Thiollier's quests, which determine who fights beside Leda and who can be summoned against her at Enir-Ilim. Leda's Rune is NOT dropped at Enir-Ilim: it is earned by siding AGAINST Leda in either duel - helping Hornsent gives Ash of War: Swift Slash and Leda's Rune, while helping Ansbach gives Ansbach's Longbow and Leda's Rune. The Ansbach duel only occurs if you sided with Leda against Hornsent. Only Leda's Sword and Leda's Armor are looted from her corpse after the Enir-Ilim battle; the rest of her visible set is the standard Oathseeker Knight set, found near the Church of Benediction. Verified against Fextralife, Game8 and GameRant wikis.

steps.title: Enter the Land of Shadow
steps.desc: Speak with Needle Knight Leda beside Miquella's withered arm at the Cocoon of the Empyrean in Mohgwyn Palace and touch the arm to be carried into the Realm of Shadow.

steps.title: Read Leda's first message
steps.desc: After defeating the Divine Beast Dancing Lion in Belurat, ride the arena elevator up and find Leda's written message declaring she pursues Miquella.

steps.title: Read Leda's second message
steps.desc: Find Leda's follow-up message at Miquella's Cross near the Castle Ensis Checkpoint grace indicating she is bound for the Shadow Keep.

steps.title: Meet the band at Highroad Cross
steps.desc: Speak with Needle Knight Leda beside the Highroad Cross grace in Scadu Altus, where she has gathered Miquella's followers, and exhaust her dialogue.

steps.title: Exhaust the gathered followers
steps.desc: Speak with the other followers assembled near Leda, including Dryleaf Dane, Hornsent, Thiollier, Sir Ansbach and Moore, to advance their interlinked questlines.
steps.warn: Exhaust all followers' dialogue (Hornsent, Ansbach, Thiollier, etc.) at Highroad Cross BEFORE breaking Miquella's charm, or you lose quest progress.

steps.title: Break Miquella's charm
steps.desc: Progress toward the Shadow Keep until the message 'Somewhere, a great rune has broken' appears, shedding Miquella's Great Rune and turning the charmed band against one another.
steps.warn: Reaching Shadow Keep breaks the charm and turns the band hostile. Finish all gathered-follower dialogues first; this gate is irreversible.

steps.title: Return to Leda after the charm breaks
steps.desc: Speak with Needle Knight Leda again at Highroad Cross, where she now suspects the band of treachery and asks whom she should investigate.

steps.title: Duel over Hornsent
steps.desc: On the boat-lined battlements before the Storehouse elevator in Shadow Keep, choose a red summon sign to aid Leda in slaying Hornsent or a gold sign to defend Hornsent against her.
steps.warn: Resolve this duel BEFORE entering Messmer's arena from Dark Chamber: the summon signs vanish there, permanently locking you out of this choice.  Â·  Helping Leda kills Hornsent for his set + talisman; defending him gives Swift Slash + Leda's Rune. Each choice permanently locks out the other's rewards.

steps.title: Find Ansbach in the library
steps.desc: Progress Sir Ansbach's quest until he appears in the Storehouse library and exhaust his dialogue to set up Leda's next confrontation.

steps.title: Duel over Ansbach
steps.desc: If you sided with Leda against Hornsent, choose the red summon sign to help Leda kill Ansbach or the gold sign to defend him so he survives for Enir-Ilim.
steps.warn: Picking the red sign to help Leda kills Ansbach permanently, losing the Obsidian Lamina and Furious Blade of Ansbach. Use the gold sign to save him.  Â·  This duel only appears if you sided with Leda against Hornsent in step 8; otherwise Leda never invades Ansbach and this step is skipped.

steps.title: Confront the band at Enir-Ilim
steps.desc: At the Cleansing Chamber Anteroom, advance into the open hall where Leda accuses you of seeking the Erdtree's throne and stages the final ambush.

steps.title: Defeat Leda and her allies
steps.desc: Kill Needle Knight Leda and her hostile companions (Dryleaf Dane plus, by your earlier choices, Freyja, Moore and Hornsent) while any saved allies like Ansbach or Thiollier fight at your side.

steps.title: Loot Leda's gear
steps.desc: Retrieve Leda's Sword from her body after the Enir-Ilim battle to claim her signature holy greatsword.

steps.title: Claim Leda's armor
steps.desc: Collect Leda's Armor from her corpse to obtain her unique chest piece and conclude the questline.

steps.title: Meet Varré at the start
steps.desc: At the very beginning of the game, White Mask Varré stands near The First Step and the Church of Elleh, mocking you as a Tarnished and pointing you toward Stormveil and Roundtable Hold. Speak with him to begin his questline.

steps.title: Obtain a Great Rune, then meet him at Rose Church
steps.desc: After defeating a shardbearer for a Great Rune and speaking with Enia at Roundtable Hold, Varré relocates to Rose Church in southwest Liurnia. Speak to him there to continue.
steps.warn: Varré only moves to Rose Church after you acquire a Great Rune and talk to Enia; if you ignore him too long across major story beats he can vanish, breaking the quest.

steps.title: Accept the Festering Bloody Finger
steps.desc: Continue talking to Varré at Rose Church until he gives you a Festering Bloody Finger, inviting you into the 'fingers' and the service of Mohg, Lord of Blood.

steps.title: Invade other Tarnished three times
steps.desc: Use the Festering Bloody Finger to invade three other players; you only need to take part, not win. If you prefer offline, invade the NPC red sign of Magnus the Beast Claw at Writheblood Ruins three times instead.
steps.warn: The offline NPC sign at Writheblood Ruins is the reliable way to complete this; co-op invasions require an online connection.

steps.title: Receive the Lord of Blood's Favor
steps.desc: Report back to Varré after the invasions and he hands you the Lord of Blood's Favor, a white cloth he asks you to soak in the blood of a maiden.

steps.title: Soak the cloth in maiden's blood
steps.desc: Take the Lord of Blood's Favor to a dead Finger Maiden and use it from your inventory to soak it in her blood. The corpse at the altar of the Church of Inhibition works, as do the maiden at the Chapel of Anticipation or a slain Hyetta.
steps.warn: You must 'Use' the cloth at the maiden's body to soak it; simply visiting does nothing. Killing Hyetta to soak it will end her own questline.

steps.title: Return the bloody cloth for the Bloody Finger
steps.desc: Bring the soaked Lord of Blood's Favor back to Varré at Rose Church. He rewards you with the reusable Bloody Finger, letting you invade freely without consuming an item.

steps.title: Receive the Pureblood Knight's Medal
steps.desc: Speak with Varré once more after handing over the cloth. He recognizes you as kin and gives you the Pureblood Knight's Medal, your invitation to Mohgwyn Palace.
steps.warn: This is the final reward of Varré's quest; obtain it before deciding whether to kill him, as his hostile turn occurs only if you attack him afterward.

steps.title: Use the Medal to reach Mohgwyn Palace
steps.desc: Use the Pureblood Knight's Medal from your inventory to teleport directly into Mohgwyn Palace, arriving at near the Dynasty Mausoleum Midpoint grace in the far northeast of the underworld.
steps.warn: Using the Medal is the early shortcut into Mohgwyn Palace; the only other entrance is a hidden teleporter in the Consecrated Snowfield much later in the game.

steps.title: Confront Mohg, Lord of Blood
steps.desc: Press deeper into Mohgwyn Palace to the Cocoon of the Empyrean and challenge Mohg, Lord of Blood, the demigod Varré served. Defeating him yields Mohg's Great Rune and his Remembrance of the Blood Lord.

steps.title: Meet Rogier in Stormveil
steps.desc: Find Sorcerer Rogier seated at the ruined chapel altar in the northwest of Stormveil Castle. Exhaust his dialogue; he can also be summoned for the Margit fight via his sign nearby.

steps.title: Rogier moves to Roundtable
steps.desc: After you defeat Godrick the Grafted, Rogier relocates to a chair on the balcony of Roundtable Hold and gives you Rogier's Rapier with the Glintblade Phalanx ash of war.

steps.title: The corpse beneath Stormveil
steps.desc: Drop down beneath Stormveil from the Liftside Chamber grace, defeat the Ulcerated Tree Spirit, then touch the bloodstain before the giant rotting face (Godwyn) to inspect the Black Knife relic.
steps.warn: The Ulcerated Tree Spirit here (b18000800) guards the corpse; you must interact with the bloodstain to advance the quest, not just kill the boss.

steps.title: Report the relic to Rogier
steps.desc: Return to Rogier at Roundtable Hold and exhaust his dialogue. He explains the corpse is tied to the Black Knives' plot and the assassination of Godwyn.

steps.title: Ask Fia about the Knifeprint
steps.desc: Speak with Fia, the Deathbed Companion at Roundtable Hold and exhaust her dialogue to receive the Knifeprint Clue, which points to the Black Knife Catacombs.

steps.title: Retrieve the Black Knifeprint
steps.desc: Travel to the Black Knife Catacombs in northern Limgrave, open the boss room, and defeat the Black Knife Assassin to claim the Black Knifeprint.
steps.warn: Use the assassin inside Black Knife Catacombs (b30110800); the Knifeprint is the quest item, so be sure to loot the chest/room afterward.

steps.title: Bring the Knifeprint to Rogier
steps.desc: Return to Rogier at Roundtable Hold with the Black Knifeprint. He analyzes it and concludes Ranni the Witch was behind the Night of the Black Knives.

steps.title: Seek out Ranni
steps.desc: Visit Ranni the Witch atop Ranni's Rise in the Three Sisters, northwest Liurnia. She brushes you off, so the conversation only sets up Rogier's next request.
steps.warn: Do not begin Ranni's vassal service until Rogier asks you to; talking to Ranni alone is fine, but advancing her quest early then resting can trigger Rogier's slumber.

steps.title: Rogier asks you to serve Ranni
steps.desc: Report back to Rogier at Roundtable Hold. He asks you to become Ranni's vassal to investigate further, then warns he is about to fall into a deep slumber.

steps.title: Collect the Spellblade Set
steps.desc: Progress Ranni's questline and rest at Roundtable Hold; Rogier falls asleep and dies. Loot his chair to obtain the Spellblade's Set and Rogier's Bell Bearing.

steps.title: Meet Florissax
steps.desc: Reach the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion at the Foot of the Jagged Peak and speak with the Dragon Communion Priestess. Accept 'Devour draconic essence' to receive the Ancient Dragon's Blessing, then exhaust her dialogue about Bayle.

steps.title: Get Black Syrup from Moore
steps.desc: Travel to the Gravesite Plain and find Moore near Main Gate Cross. Exhaust his dialogue across his quest until he gives you the Black Syrup.
steps.warn: Missable: progress Moore's quest and collect Black Syrup before he despairs and leaves, or you cannot make the Concoction.

steps.title: Make Thiollier's Concoction
steps.desc: Bring the Black Syrup to Thiollier and give it to him. He brews it into Thiollier's Concoction, the sleep elixir Florissax needs.
steps.warn: Missable: requires Thiollier's questline progress; advance his quest before he relocates or the Concoction is lost.

steps.title: Catch Florissax at night
steps.desc: Pass time at a distant Site of Grace until nightfall, then return to the Grand Altar. Find Florissax praying to Placidussax and give her Thiollier's Concoction, putting her to sleep.
steps.warn: Missable: she only prays at night and only before Bayle is killed. Do this BEFORE defeating Bayle or the spirit ash reward is lost forever.

steps.title: Wait one day cycle
steps.desc: After she falls asleep, pass one full in-game day at a Site of Grace, then return to the altar so she stirs and the quest can continue.

steps.title: Climb the Jagged Peak
steps.desc: From the Foot of the Jagged Peak, ascend the mountain past the Jagged Peak Drakes, resting at the Jagged Peak Mountainside grace along the way.

steps.title: Reach the summit
steps.desc: Continue to the Jagged Peak Summit grace at the top of the mountain, the gateway to Bayle's lair below.

steps.title: Defeat Bayle the Dread
steps.desc: Drop into the lair and slay Bayle the Dread, the ancient dragon Florissax reveres. Summon Igon for his dialogue and loot if desired.

steps.title: Return for Dragonbolt
steps.desc: Fast travel back to the Grand Altar of Dragon Communion and speak with Florissax. She rewards you with the Dragonbolt of Florissax incantation.

steps.title: Confess and claim Florissax
steps.desc: Talk to her again, confess that you put her to sleep, and accept becoming her lord. She pledges herself, transforming into the Ancient Dragon Florissax spirit ashes left at the altar.
steps.warn: Only available if you gave her the Concoction before killing Bayle. If you skipped the Concoction, you instead receive the Priestess Heart and Flowerstone Gavel here.

steps.title: Get your first Deathroot
steps.desc: Defeat the Tibia Mariner at Summonwater Village in northeast Limgrave to claim an early Deathroot. Deathroot also drops from other Tibia Mariners and certain bosses across the Lands Between.

steps.title: Reach the Bestial Sanctum
steps.desc: Travel to the Bestial Sanctum in Greyoll's Dragonbarrow, in the far east. Early on it is reached via the teleporter chest in the Fringefolk Hero's Cave at the Stranded Graveyard.
steps.warn: The Fringefolk Hero's Cave teleporter chest is behind a fog wall that needs 2 Stonesword Keys and flings you deep into high-level Dragonbarrow - a known trap.

steps.title: Feed the first Deathroot
steps.desc: Give a Deathroot to Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman, beside the sanctum grace. He rewards the Clawmark Seal and the Beast Eye, which pulses when Deathroot is near.

steps.title: Second Deathroot
steps.desc: Return with another Deathroot for the Bestial Sling incantation.

steps.title: Third Deathroot
steps.desc: A third Deathroot earns the Beast Claw incantation.

steps.title: Fourth Deathroot
steps.desc: A fourth Deathroot grants the Stone of Gurranq incantation.
steps.warn: After the fourth Deathroot, Gurranq turns hostile the next time you visit (reload the area) - you must fight him.

steps.title: Pacify Gurranq, then keep feeding
steps.desc: Lower Gurranq's health until he relents - do NOT finish him. Once calmed, further Deathroots reward Beast's Roar and then Gurranq's Beast Claw.
steps.warn: Do not kill Gurranq - killing him ends the quest and forfeits the remaining incantations.
